rating 4.0. Okay but the cord is lower quality than expected I go through a lot of cords like this in my jewelry business, but I usually make them myself by buying a spool of rat tail and attaching the crimp ends myself.

This takes a lot of time and while I usually sell them for $2 (a cheap add-on for a nicer pendant), it's a time consuming way to make a profit. So I saw these and figured I would order them.

I haven't opened the package yet (I'm working my way through my current stock of neck cords), but it's a clear bag and you can see what you have here. So as far as I know the clasps are adequate but I have not checked them yet.

The cord is a lesser quality than the craft store version. I guess you could say it is not as well compacted. Rat tail is made up of a core surrounded by a lot of thin polyester fibers that until now I hadn't given much thought to. I guess they use some kind of sizing or glue to hold the fibers in place, maybe also heat fuse them together a little?

These ones are more free-floating so there are wisps that will easily snag on a jump ring.

I will try running them over a candle flame to see if that helps keep them from fraying on my customers. I don't want to get a bad reputation from these. If that doesn't work (sometimes it does, sometimes it doesn't with other rat tail) I'll reuse the clasps and replace them with the craft store stuff.

Rating this 4 stars for now. If I have trouble with this I will come back and adjust the rating and update my review. If you are reading this and it's been a month or longer, then assume the clasps are good and the candle trick worked.

Care: Wash it on delicate cycle in cold water. Shake it out really good. Lay it flat or hang it to dry. Then put it in the dryer to fluff any wrinkles out. I gave it 4 stars because the material is not the best but is good for the price of the dress.

rating 2.0. Remove arms before wearing! Warning: may be made by the Texas Chainsaw Killer! Why? Where the sleeves attach to the bodice, the opening is so small that it feels as though the job is to remove your arms! The sleeves are fine, the fit of the dress is fine, but the arm holes are killers! When first putting the dress on, it doesn't seem any more snug than the rest of this form fitting bodice, but within 10 minutes, the issue becomes apparent. Sad, too, because everything about the dress made it a keeper.
When I took it in to have it altered in order to try and wear it again, even the tailor laughed at how small the arm holes were. Not cool, dude. Not cool.

rating 3.0. They seem to be pretty good so far I am disabled and wear this style of slipper pretty much all day, every day. I need something that is flexible and non-slip. I've tried for warmer bootie style slippers in the winter, but so far they have all let my feet slide around in them, either out of the package or after a very short time.
So these are my every day shoes, and I don't expect them to last a long time.

First Impressions since I just got them today:

I've been buying [[ASIN:B00B04VBQ2 Snoozies Womand Cozy Slippers Brights Collection (chevron stripes, large)]] and other Snoozies at twice the price. So when I needed new ones I gave in to the temptation to buy 4 pairs for the price of 2. Out of the package they look very similar. There is a little more loose fuzz, but otherwise these are very much like the Snoozies.

I got the L/XL for my 10 1/2-11 extra wide feet, and these appear to be a little snug out of the package, but this is good. My experience with this style of slipper is that they do stretch. These might be a little too loose for a size ten.

I immediately tested out the non-slip dots on the wickedly slippery laminate floor that came with the house, and they definitely don't slide or slip. I am hoping that the dot style of non-slip on the bottoms will last longer than the strips or printing on others that I've had.

I do wish that the pink bows on the blue/yellow polka-dot pair had been sown on instead of glued, but they are glued so thoroughly that I'll have to live with it for now. With any luck they'll come off in the wash.

And speaking of wash, these are officially hand wash, cool water, air dry. As are most "washable" slippers. And as usual, I'll completely ignore that and put them in with the rest of the wash. I know that this means that they will wear out sooner, and is probably the reason that the non-slip bits on my slippers always get brittle, but I just don't hand wash anything. I do have a front load washer which seems to treat things much better than a top loader.

If these fall apart soon, or stretch too much, I'll come back and edit this review.

08/08/16
- The pile on the fabric is matting down inside and doesn't recover after washing.
- The cut of these is a little different than the Snoozies, and they seem to come off a little more easily.

rating 4.0. Tight and Secure These earring backs are substantial. I chose the flower shape because they seem way more secure on the earring and the rigid feel allows a grip on them when you are placing them on.

I will say that they are not perfect:
* They range in size from big to small
* Every few of them has hole that's actually too small, forcing you to make a hole with your earring
* A lot of the earring backs still have extra plastic on the edges and at either end of the hole, it's apparent that they're a little cheap.

Conclusion:
But despite it all, they're still secure, sturdy and do they do their job

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. They come in handy! So far so good. These are a nice inexpensive option to have in case your backings are lost or too loose. I've only used a couple so far but I've had no problems at all yet. I'll post an update if I do.

input: rating 5.0. DON'T LET PRICE STOP YOU FROM PURCHASING I was very surprised at the quality of this set of earrings. The stones are clear and the mountings are better than I thought they would be. I am currently wearing the 7 and 6 mm size. The only reason I am not wearing the 8 mm is because my piercings are close together and the earrings were actually touching in one of my ears. I may switch to the 8 mm and wear the 4 or 5 mm with them.  The negatives are the backs are very small so I changed them with some stainless steel backs that I already have. The other is that the posts are very thin and they might break if you change the earrings very often but at this price they are definitely worth buying several sets.

rating 5.0. the backs fit awfully tight and are really hard to ... the backs fit awfully tight and are really hard to get on to secure at first. I am not interested in a replacement as I didn't want a replacement and figured they would loosen with use which they have. Update: The company contacted me by e-mail to provide a replacement. We haven't had a chance to try them because my daughter refuses to wear them, the last pair caused her too much trouble. I'm increasing my rating to three stars, because the company did reach out and try to resolve it. For people that don't have sensitive ears, this is a fairly nice product for what you pay. Don't have huge expectations though, as they are inexpensive and I'm not sure the metal is truly stainless steel all the way through.

rating 5.0. The package came only a few days later (much to my surprise as I thought the price was a sign that the product would be too good These earrings were exactly what I was looking for...descending, matching earrings that don't leave a green residue from metal on earlobes. I have sensitive skin and my ears are constantly irritated by store bought CZ earrings; seeing these were reasonably priced, I figured I had nothing to lose. The package came only a few days later (much to my surprise as I thought the price was a sign that the product would be too good to be true) and earrings were individually packaged by pair and all were placed in a cloth pouch. Overall, I have 0 complaints with this order and will return to this seller when I need new earrings. So far, I have been wearing these earrings for 6 weeks and there are no signs of wear and tear. They still shine and aren't dingy like most get after awhile. I would most definitely recommend this product!

Bums me out cuz I really wanted cotton since I live in an area that gets to be 100 in the summer. This material will cause more sweat. Aside from the material I like it. Just won't be able to wear it as I thought due to the fabric. Plus there is no tag stating the type of fabric or washing instructions. Hopefully it doesn't have to be dry cleaned, I'd have to drive 20+ miles to a dry cleaners. After wearing the dress a couple times b4 I washed it I was going to take back most of what I wrote. I really began to love it & I found the washing instructions that said machine wash & line dry. I did exactly that in cold water & the dress shrank close to 3 inches on the bottom. Now the pockets lay right at the largest part of my hips & make me look awful. Plus the straps won't stay in place & slide. I'm so bummed cuz I was truly liking it. Also the tag says polyester & 20% cotton. Guess I'm stuck with it now & it's just a house dress!!

input: rating 5.0. Pretty, shiny, and quite durable! I am hard on endless hoops and typically break/bend/destroy hoops if they are 100% sterling. These are 2.5mm thickness, and the metal they used to strengthen the silver in this alloy is perfect - these hoops can stand up to a beating.They are big - not comically so, but they do make a statement. Shiny. I'm getting an extra pair as backup!

In my opinion since the earrings are so nice and sturdy why not make a thicker connection.  I'm going to look elsewhere if the last 2 pairs I bought break again.  Shame cause I truly LOVE them.

rating 5.0. It's the best infinity loop I've found - Very happy with this purchase! So far I really love these earrings. I searched so hard for a clasp that wasn't bulky. It seems that all other clasps are clamp like, I wanted my hoops to look like they were continuous.... an infinity loop. These are perfect. The clasp feels a little flimsy at first, but then I realized it was built to pivot and it makes it easier to insert into your earlobes. I was also concerned about it turning green. I haven't subjected these to water yet and I haven't been stuck in the rain with them yet, so I don't know if that will happen. They do, however, come in a nice little case, so I'm careful to store them in there when I'm done wearing them. I hope to preserve these as long as I can. So far they are looking great after about 10 uses. LOVE THEM!
UPDATE 2 YEARS AFTER PURCHASE: These are STILL 100% perfect and I wear them all the time! I am very pleased with this purchase. Nothing turned green and they have been used and abused for 2 years now. I'm a hoop girl and these are the best hoops I've ever owned.

rating 4.0. SILVER BEAUTIES! These hoops are a great size for everyday wearing. They are medium sized in thickness; will not bend on their own but are lighter (which is lovely) and thinner than most. This purchase is well worth the money spent; the quality would justify a higher price point. Not to give any ideas to Amazon...

input:
rating 4.0. Cute yoga socks The product came 1 day earlier than expected which was a nice surprise considering I live in Hawaii. I have washed it (placed in a lingerie bag) in a washing machine and hung it to dry. It still fits well, but I have only used all of the socks once or twice. I am hoping that it will last as it is comfortable and helps me grip the floor when I am in my yoga class. Others in my class have made positive comments about my cute purple and pink socks. I also like that each of my toes are separated. It helps me spread my toes to balance and also keeps my toes and feet dry.

As others have stated, there may be some room for those of us with shorter toes. I would give it 5 stars, but a few of my white grips came off of a sock the first time I wore it.

rating 5.0. I ordered this item because my feet were becoming cold ... I ordered this item because my feet were becoming cold during yoga class.  They are a little challenging to put on the first time for your toes, but that does improve with each wearing.  I don't slip with these socks.  The grippers work well and my feet are no longer cold.
rating 2.0. Two Stars Even though the outside part of sock did not slip it did inside the sock.

rating 2.0. Toe grips wore down quickly I am giving this product only two stars. This is due to the little rubber grips on the toe part of the socks have worn down after only one or two washes. I was using them for my pilates class where we are on a mega reformer, so we are on our toes a lot, and these just did not keep the grip that you need for the class. Since I have 4 of them, instead of throwing them away, I decided to cut off the toes and will use them for yoga until the other part of the grips wear down.

rating 1.0. Cheap, too big and had previously been returned I normally wear a size 8 shoe, so my feet size is pretty average.  These socks are loose and have no support or cushioning at all, they are very thin.  Furthermore, the package I received had clearly been returned by the previous owner.  I know this because there was a note on the package saying that the socks were too big and loose and difficult to put on.

rating 4.0. Product is good. My issue is with toe fit Product is good.  My issue is with toe fit.  If your not accustomed to socks with toe fit takes a little adjusting.  I would buy from this company again just not with fitted toes.

rating 5.0. Good deal Update: awesome customer service! Seller promptly replied to the issue with the socks and resolved the issue quickly. Would definitely purchase from them again!

I have a few pairs of yoga socks, all of them I purchased in person. I saw this deal and got super excited - 4 pairs for the price of one!

The socks fit like all of my other yoga socks, but as soon as I started putting them on the rubber grips on the bottom started to flake off. I'll definitely still wear these but I doubt the grippy bottoms will last through the first few wears and washes.
rating 3.0. Three Stars They're made of thinner material than expected.

rating 3.0. making them feel more like hospital socks than yoga footwear There was not a lot of room in the heel, causing frustration as the sock slipped down on a constant basis.  Other brands off set this with an exaggerated heel.  The fabric does not have a lot of stretch in it, making them feel more like hospital socks than yoga footwear.  I think there are better brands available.  I would not buy this brand again.  However, for the low price I snagged these socks for on Amazon Deal of the Day, I cannot be mad at my purchase.
rating 2.0. Two Stars Why if they are "one size fits all" are they made to fit a very small foot?

We love it and will definitely buy more.

rating 2.0. I have average sized feet, but these fit too ... I have average sized feet, but these fit too snug around the toes and ball of the foot. Yes, I tried simply pulling a little slack of the end of each toe, but then they were too long on the toe. Give it a try, you can always return if they don't fit YOU.

rating 3.0. Not for Yoga/Exercise I often don't review an item when I feel it's just OK and I don't have anything to say that hasn't already been said. Then I received an e-mail including this phrase, "If everything is satisfied, could you please kindly take a few minutes to offer us a feedback and review.
we just want you know your review and feedback will be very very important for us." The grammarian in me is cringing and other than that, I do have something to add.

If you've ever owned any other yoga/exercise toe socks you might assume these are the same. I bought these for a great price on a lightning deal, so I'm not angry and returning them. However, I would not recommend wearing these to yoga class. It would be far too easy to slip inside the sock, resulting in an injury. There isn't enough stretch to the material and the extra fabric on the front of the ankle is awkward. With the exception of freezing temperatures, it's healthier to wear toe separating socks so my review is to go ahead and buy them for wearing socks at home during the winter, but avoid them if you plan on using them for exercise.

rating 4.0. I'm an A cup and it is comfortable. Look Size-wise: it fits well for me. I'm an A cup and it is comfortable.
Look: it does look like the image, but up close you can see that it was cheaply made.
Material: also on the cheaper side

I personally don't care too much for the stitching or quality. I'm not doing anything super physical with this, so, I still like this bralette. It's probably not going to last long with constant use, so if that's what you're looking for, maybe invest in something better.
However, I think it is a little expensive for what you're getting. But it was on Prime shipping.

If you are a bigger chested woman, I don't think this is very supportive. The lower band is quite relaxed and stretchy and if you raised your arms, you might get underboob coming out. But if you're not wearing this alone to go out, and have something over it or just wearing it at home, I'm sure it's fine.

rating 5.0. Stunning Being on a budget I searched for a dress for a formal that would be beautiful yet inexpensive. When i came across this dress and reviews I was amazed. Everyone to me looked stunning.  I read the review over and over and decided to order it. So here are my measurements 36c 29 41...i ordered a large because the reviews stated as expected and I wear large and sometimes medium.  So when I received the dress it came in a simple plastic packaging, I thought I would be disappointed but I took it out and tried it on and was AMAZED! IT WAS NOT as revealing as the picture, It was a SEXY fit with the right bra. The V cut in the front was perfect and I do have a "bubble " butt and it didn't rise as other dresses where it's ridiculously short, it was PERFECT!! I WAS COMPLIMENTED all night and I wasn't ashamed to say how much I paid...no 1 believed me. The only thing  that was a little off was the space I had on my waist area..it was just a little space so when I sat you could see it and in the back part too..above my butt was a little space but I rather space than too tight. I highly recommend this dress !! Seriously try it for yourself!! I will be ordering the black one just to have!!

rating 4.0. Lozayi Portable Blender This is my second purchase of portable blender but different brands.
I really like this product for use. Bottle is made with glass which is big plus and size is also big enough.

rating 5.0. Great blender This blender is my favorite blender. It easy to carry and easy to clean. The top part is a glass tube. When I clean it, I can separate it into three parts, so I can clean all the details of the blender. I recommend this blender.

rating 5.0. Super easy to clean, very strong blender [[VIDEOID:16160a5197119c66de6c151e4731e8e1]] I actually am blown away by how awesome this portable blender is. We go camping alot and I was looking for a battery powered blender for smoothies and making pureed food for our baby. This blender has been so awesome I find myself using this now for my at home blending needs as well. The battery life is great, the blending power is just as good as my full sized blender, and with the glass body and easy to remove lid(s)/components it is easier to clean than my full sized unit! I like that I can blend and then flip the unit, unscrew the battery/blade assembly and screw on the orange plastic cap and have a portable storage container that holds the blended food/beverage for easy fridge or ice chest travel! No need to transfer blended goods to a different container! So basically this is an all in one unit, you don't have to pack a bunch of other items to be able to utilize this blender. I love this handy gadget!

rating 5.0. I was surprised I really didnt have super high hopes for this, I went for one that was a tiny bit more expensive and I'm glad I did. rating 4.0. best purchase of 2020 - but one flaw photo shows the on/off button is easily scratched. weird fragile plastic over it, crumbles off. little upsetting because it’s a cosmetic flaw & makes it look crappy & cheap. i’ve turned it on/off maybe a total of 10 times now & it’s started flaking. i’d recommend to the manufacturer to do something different with that weird plastic film over the power button. didn’t give it 5 stars for that exact reason. i don’t expect things i buy to start flaking after just a few uses. upset it’s only going to get progressively worse.

other than that the blending power is really good. not smart to use chunks of frozen fruit. i’d recommend if anything freeze only your blueberries & the rest of the fruit/veggie should be thaw. small frozen pieces is all i’m saying. large frozen chunks prevent the blade from spinning.

been using it for fruit smoothies & gym smoothies. the glass component is really nice! (plastic is awful.) love how the lids can be placed on either side of the glass container. feels sturdy. excited to use it for travel. i’d definitely buy another as a gift - just fix the film over the power button first.

rating 4.0. Good blender for the price I wanted to be able to make quick smoothies with veg and fruit as well as some powder supplements that I take daily and this blender makes it super easy and quick to have a delicious smoothie any time of the day. The charge on it will last a handful of blends but you will need to charge it often if used daily. I recently used it to blend homemade tomatoe sauce and blend a brazilian quick bread and I have to say it worked well though the bread mixture did get a little thick it handled it best it could. If you are unsure of buying this product, don't hesitant! Its great for quick easy use. I am happy with mine. Best 35 bucks ive ever spent on amazon.

rating 5.0. Excellent, No-Fuss Portable Blender I've had a couple of these single-serve portable blenders, and they've all had problems: died after a few uses, turned on randomly while the blades were exposed (!!!), or couldn't handle serious blending (I'm talking bananas here, not rocks). I've had the LOZAYI Portable Blender for about a month with near-daily use, and I haven't had a single issue. It does a great job with protein shakes (powder, banana, bit of milk), doesn't have to be 'tipped' like other similar blenders, and can be set down on the counter while you do something else.  Auto-off after about 20 second is usually enough to full mix everything. Cleaning is easy - Just rinse/run with soapy water after use, and throw the glass bottle piece into the dishwasher every now and then for deeper cleaning. Only wish they made more colors. Otherwise, love it!

rating 3.0. Faulty product; leaking I received my product and I was so excited to use it. Charged quickly, easy to clean, I like the idea of glass bottle. However, this bottle is leaking! I got the faulty product. The other lid has no silicone ring on it, so now it’s leaking everywhere. I hope they checked their product first before sending it to costumers. It’s just frustrating. So now I have to ask for replacement and return this one. Not so convenient. But we’ll see how this replacement look like.

rating 5.0. Buy it! No complaints a month later Uh hello!! I love this thing! I've been on the keto diet for a month now and by the way I've lost 10 lb😁 so I bought this thing to mix my shakes along with the MCT oil and carnitine along with ice. This thing is so portable now that I'm finally back to work, due to the covid-outbreak, I have been taking it to work with me. I cannot tell you how many people have complimented it and said they want to buy one now! My boyfriend also wants one. I seriously have bought a second one that's just kind of hanging out. I kind of keep hinting to him that if he wants one I'd get him one, duh, there's one sitting with all our keto stuff right in front of them in a box and he doesn't even know it. I kind of don't want to share it though LOL. Anyway, the things to say about this is you have to make sure the battery is fully powered in order for it to go through the full 20 seconds to blend when blending with ice. I use crushed ice from our refrigerator and if the battery is not fully charged it'll shut off every 3 seconds until the ice is chopped enough to where it'll run for the full 20. That is seriously my only complaint on this thing. And it's not even really a complaint. The other thing I want to point out is somebody's comment on here said that you can't get the little silicone rings out of the lids in order to clean, that is not true, I use a butter knife to pry them out and it's fairly easy to do so. I have done this many times in the month that I have owned this thing and they have not broken or bent or anything! I also bought this little cozy here on Amazon and it's just made for a coffee cup and fits perfectly around this! Buy it!

But the blender is not the only thing that makes this a 5 star device, my unit malfunctioned recently and I contacted the seller a few hours later, the replied with the following message, “we are sorry that our product caused you inconvenience, rest assured that we will  take care of you”, two days later a new blender showed up at my door!  I thought customer service was dead in this country but this vendor restored my faith!!!!

rating 2.0. Very disappointed Very disappointed,  Im a 36 34 40, 5'4" 145 lbs. I  usually wear a medium  but on amazon I usually have to by a large or xl, so i went with a large. This dress was so cute in the picture, but does not fit like picture depicts. I did like it but saw to many cons to keep it. First off it was not the type of material i hoped it would be, i wanted material with minimal stretch. Second, it was much longer than the picture depicted, I wanted one that fell above the knee and this one was 2 inches below the knee plus the cut for the hips was at my upper thigh making it look odd.Third, the bottom hemline was crooked, im a bit ocd and that would drive me up a wall. Forth, the size chart is very confusing, with the way they have it listed it seems like all sizes should fit. I was thinking about trying it in a smaller size but i would have to get a small to fit the length I want and im afraid that would be to tight around my waist and not hide my belly fat. The large did fall perfectly in that concern.

rating 4.0. I haven't found a good strapless bra so this was my solution I bought this to go with a maxi dress of the same color so my straps will blend in with the dress. I haven't found a good strapless bra so this was my solution. I wear a 36B and ordered the Medium. The cup doesn't cover as much as I would prefer but it's not a big deal. The band itself is very tight so I feel like it's a bit hard to breath compared to my other bras that are similar. The spaghetti straps themselves just hold the bra in place, but offer no support. If you are looking for a bra with more support from the straps then this is not for you. It is labeled as a low impact bra for this reason. I plan on wearing it under a maxi dress with thin spaghetti straps of the same color so this bra offers me some support without going strapless and without making the bra straps stand out against my dress.

rating 5.0. Worth the price and worth getting! :-) I got this dress in a Large because of some of the reviews I read on it.  It fits nicely and I've worn the dress 3 times already.  I'm 5'9, so if you're looking for a dress to the ankle, this isn't it.  I'd say it's more tea-length in that regard.  However, since I love wearing boots in the fall/winter, it's a perfect look for that.  I'll probably leave it hanging in the summer months because I like and wear all my skirts to the ankles...  I'm just more comfortable with that kind of look.  However, if you don't care about ankle-length, or if you're a shorter woman, the length on this dress will probably be great for you.  The L is SLIGHTLY snug in the breast area, but since I wear it with a jean vest or another kind of lightweight jacket, the snugness isnt an issue.  I think I would order an XL next time, but there's so much fabric in the bottom half of the dress, that I'd be nervous it would look too roomy on me.  I normally wear a 14-16/18-20 pant/skirt (depending on how it's made and whether or not it has elastic in the waist); and an 18-20/22-24 on top (again, depending on how something is made and because I tend to like my tops roomy for that comfortable look & fit).  So if your dress sizes are anywhere in those ranges, you could probably get away with a Large or an XL and be just fine.  I will order another dress like this in a different color because I like it a lot.....  That's why I'm giving it 5-stars. It's really a great dress for an economic price that you can wear with anything and almost for any occasion if it's not TOO dressy of an event.  You can have fun with this dress and really make it work for you in terms of every day wear or day into night occasions! :-)

rating 5.0. Exceptional addition to every wardrobe! I love this dress so much, I've ordered multiple colors!  I'm mildly obsessed. The fit is perfect. So, while I haven't actually used this bag yet for travel, I am a person that has travelled quite a lot and I believe this Magictodoor travel case will work out great!

rating 3.0. Problematic closing mechanism The watch looks great and is designed beautifully with large and clear face, but the closure is difficult to use and not reliable. The watch may appear locked, but the mechanism can be loose.
I understand the company has undertaken to correct this fault, and I would give it another chance.
I would definitely give another star or 2 for this lovely design, once the lock issue is resolved.

rating 4.0. Nice watch! Glass cracked :-( but seller refunded my money. I got this for my wife along with a few other cute things as an anniversary present. Looks nice out of the box and easy to adjust the band. The first time she wore it the glass cracked so she handed it back to me to return. Unfortunately its past 30 days, and amazon wont take it back. Sad to waste money on a broken watch that we can't use. I would not recommend.

Update: The seller contacted me and offered a refund! What a nice thing for them to do! I did not expect that, and I have updated my star rating from 1 to 4. I still took off one star because it is broken, but I very much appreciate the refund, and would consider buying from Valbuy as an Amazon seller in the future.

rating 5.0. PERFECT !! I wasn't sure there would be anything that could cover my RSD swollen feet, wrapped in soft cloth.. but no grip on bottom..I took a chance and ordered these...they are perfect..sturdy and big, wide and long..... these will last me for a long time... they do get warm... but work great to get a chore done now and then... I completely recommend these !!!..REVIEW UPDATE WITH IMAGES.... Man size 12 RSDystrophy in both feet.. still kick around with left foot in wheelchair... FIRST the foot is is wrapped in a soft cotton cloth.. THEN the giant paws sock is folded back and slipped over the toes, unrolling over the foot.... the grip is unbeatable..can't wear for too long because of the heat factor.. but for a quick 5 or 10 minutes.. it's good....WHY so much detail? Because many of you readers find yourselves in this same situation, and you need this info... No one showed me this... I discovered it... and am sharing it....

rating 1.0. Dramatically thinner and shorter that they used to be. Terrible Quality These socks should be identical to the ones that I bought in March of 2019. Those are long, thick and durable. Before I bought them, I even clicked through to this listing for them from my previous order list, just to be sure. They arrived today and I was very disappointed to find that they are dramatically thinner than the ones from my previous order. I would guess that they're easily 40 percent thinner now. The manufacturer is also saving money by cutting the length significantly. I don't expect these to last. These are not what they used to be. :(

Update: These socks proved to be terrible quality and began falling apart within a few washes. I only wear them in the house so they are never subjected to heavy wear. These are not the same socks that they used to be. I wonder if these are not the genuine Pillow Paws socks. That's how bad they are.

input: rating 5.0. Pretty, shiny, and quite durable! I am hard on endless hoops and typically break/bend/destroy hoops if they are 100% sterling. These are 2.5mm thickness, and the metal they used to strengthen the silver in this alloy is perfect - these hoops can stand up to a beating.They are big - not comically so, but they do make a statement. Shiny. I'm getting an extra pair as backup!

rating 3.0. Five Stars I love these earrings.  I love them so much that I have bought at least 6 pairs.  My ONLY complaint is that the connection from one side to the other breaks off ALL the time.  So I have multiple earrings with no hook and they are sterling and don't want to throw them out but am unsure how to take care of this problem.  In my opinion since the earrings are so nice and sturdy why not make a thicker connection.  I'm going to look elsewhere if the last 2 pairs I bought break again.  Shame cause I truly LOVE them.

rating 5.0. It's the best infinity loop I've found - Very happy with this purchase! So far I really love these earrings. I searched so hard for a clasp that wasn't bulky. It seems that all other clasps are clamp like, I wanted my hoops to look like they were continuous.... an infinity loop. These are perfect. The clasp feels a little flimsy at first, but then I realized it was built to pivot and it makes it easier to insert into your earlobes. I was also concerned about it turning green. I haven't subjected these to water yet and I haven't been stuck in the rain with them yet, so I don't know if that will happen. They do, however, come in a nice little case, so I'm careful to store them in there when I'm done wearing them. I hope to preserve these as long as I can. So far they are looking great after about 10 uses. LOVE THEM!
UPDATE 2 YEARS AFTER PURCHASE: These are STILL 100% perfect and I wear them all the time! I am very pleased with this purchase. Nothing turned green and they have been used and abused for 2 years now. I'm a hoop girl and these are the best hoops I've ever owned.

rating 4.0. SILVER BEAUTIES! These hoops are a great size for everyday wearing. They are medium sized in thickness; will not bend on their own but are lighter (which is lovely) and thinner than most. The part that goes into your ear is extra long which is perfect for it insures that the earring stem will not pull out for any reason. Gorgeous packaging that I will reuse *smile*. This purchase is well worth the money spent; the quality would justify a higher price point. Not to give any ideas to Amazon...

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. It is very hard to find GOOD large endless hoops I would give these 10 stars if I could. It is very hard to find GOOD large endless hoops. These are amazing! The wire end fits far into the hollow opening for a very secure closure. They are thick enough to make a statement as well as large enough to make an impression. I ordered these to replace my artisan 3" hoops and am surprised to say most people would never know the difference. I am in the jewelry trade and very picky. If you are looking for a large, quality sterling hoop, look no farther. This hoop is fantastic...and inexpensive to boot!

I could tell the comfort would be there if they were just a touch longer or a touch wider. It was heartbreaking to return them but my shoes have to be comfortable so back they went.

rating 5.0. The best shower sandals that I have ever owned. Probably the best shower sandal that I have owned.

The closed cell foam means that it does not retain dirty water from public showers. As a result, it does not squish and leave wet shoeprints behind once you have left the locker room, either.

The thong is made of the same material, and it feels like it is molded as one unit, as opposed to having the strap fused on afterwards. The sandals themselves will wear out long before the bit that goes between your toes rips out of it.

rating 4.0. Cheap and functional These sandals were cheap and relatively comfortable. The fit is pretty accurate and they serve their purpose in dorm / gym-like settings. The design doesn't drain water water very effectively, so I sort of wish they either had raised bumps or some holes so you're feet wouldn't squish around after you've left the shower area. All-in-all not a bad buy for the price.

rating 5.0. Perfect for the gym shower I bought this to be used only for the shower at my gym. I did not want to pay $40 for Nike or Adidas, considering the use, and I am happy I got this. They fit exactly right, and they are actually better than the Adidas I used to have, meaning, these dry super quickly. The old Adidas, for which I paid around $30, stayed wet most of the time, they cracked, the color went away after a couple of months, and bottomline, it was a waste of my money. These are perfect. Again, all I need this is for the shower. They are very comfortable and the price is great. Get them!

rating 2.0. Ouch, ouch, ouch!!!!!!!!!!!! So sad about this purchase. Didn't try them on when they arrived because they "looked" like the would fit, even though they seem to be a bit narrow for a men's size 10. Wore them during my morning swim work out this morning and all I have to say is "OUCH"! The piece between the big and index toe is fixed on rubbing that whole area. In the short time I had them from the locker room to the pool and then to the showers, I was in so much pain when I finally took them off. It is more painful on the left foot than the right foot. No matter how I try to adjust it by pushing it over, it did not work. As I am at work, about 2 hours of wearing them, the whole area in-between my left big toe and index toe is throbbing and is painful as if I still have the shoes on and that piece is rubbing against it.

*UPDATED REVIEW FROM 17APR17 ON 20APR17
EXCELLENT customer service, I had to give one more star. They processed the refund with no questions asked, no issues as I have had with some of my other purchases. I returned them using the Amazon Locker option and received my refund sooner than I have in the past, in my opinion.

rating 5.0. They are good quality, and appear like they should last years I appreciate these sanadals, they are made of a durable plastic-elastomer that looks like it will hold up for many years.  I like the toughness, the plastic is not thin and flimsy, robust enough it seems to take my Hobbit like feet in comfort.  I travel a lot and although I have always worn sandals around the Hotel room, I usually took them off when I took a shower.  Coming back from Brazil, I found myself with a difficult to cure fungal infection, which I conclude was from the Hotel showers (the only place I had exposure).  Now I should be able to minimize / eliminate this type of exposure.  The two concerns are chemical degradation (Chlorine in the USA for example) and if the plastic has topography/porosity that would allow mold or bacteria growth, that I won't know until I get some miles on them.

rating 5.0. Ninja Style Hair Band! I’ve been wanting something to keep my hair out of my face when I’m home since I’m growing it out, and this has worked amazingly! I have an extremely fat head, I can’t remember the measurement, but a fireman’s helmet didn’t fit me in third grade (for perspective). So this ninja type headband was more than I even expected! I was going to just get a normal sweatband or a pack of those headbands that women use to wash their face, but this is “sporty” and is Nike brand! I wear it every day I’m at home to keep my messy hair pulled back and look fly doing it. It’s extremely comfortable and I forget I even have it on usually. If this one goes missing or is finally run ragged I’m in line for another one of these bad boys!

rating 4.0. Runner Approved! I like these but wish they were a bit tighter on the foot as well.  Great calf compression for recovery! I run 15-20 miles a week and these have really helped me with recovery and preventing calf strains.

rating 4.0. Great socks to use on airplane but wish it didn't have pattern These are wonderful, they helped my legs not hurt while on the airplane and didn't overheat my legs or feet. If you wear them in hot weather then it course your feet might get sweaty, which happened to me but only after a few hours of having to wear them outside the airport because I didn't have a chance to take them off.

The only thing I'd change is that they have that pattern on them and the seams press in lines on my legs so when going from wearing these for hours and then taking them off to wear shorts and sandals I'm left with indentations of long weird lines in my legs and feet. It looks ugly and they slightly hurt from being pressed in so long. It does bother a bit when you have them on too but not enough to make me feel the need to remove the socks. This is the only reason I'm giving it 4 stars, however they do work really well to help reduce swelling and pain. Just be aware of that in case you're planning on wearing a party dress or something right after that you will have lines in your legs for a bit after taking these off.

cons:-

rating 4.0. Best so far I ordered one pair of these and one pair of the similar ones by best fitness sold for $13,99 each. I have bought 3 previous multi packs of compression socks for my husband by other manufactures and they were all problematic so I figured when buying from new manufactures this time I would order one of each and wait to order more based on his preference and how they hold up in the wash.  They hold up well (have been washed in hot water multiple times and put in the dryer without losing elasticity or shrinking) and most importantly stay up on his legs while working and provide good support and pressure. He works 10-12 hours on his feet and these have been the best by far. I have ordered additional pairs. I would have given five stars except for the $10 per pair price point but they were still less expensive than the best fitness socks and a better product.

rating 5.0. Very comfortable and supportive I really like these compression socks. They are very tight and compress the leg very well. My legs did not feel fatigued when I took them off. They reach just beneath the knee cap. I would recommend these to anyone looking for quality compression socks.

rating 4.0. These are good compression socks I put chased them for long flight ... These are good compression socks I put chased them for long flight to Europe. They are not too tight. They were able to provide compression without making me feel as though my circulation was cut off.

rating 2.0. You get what you pay for I ordered these because they were priced lower than most compression socks. Although the sizing info seems to be correct and the material they are made of feels goods, they are not particularly well made. I say this because the toe seams are very thick--not flat like more expensive compression socks. They are thick enough for me to feel when wearing them and rub against my shoe. I didn't trust them not to give me a blister. If you have tough toes that can handle the rubbing of a thick toe seam, they might not be a problem for you. The seller does show interest by sending a follow-up email. When I described the toe seam problem I had, they wished me luck. I returned the socks.
rating 5.0. Kept my feet feeling good all day On my feet all day and these worked great and as advertised. They are tough to get on but not to tough. I would definitely recommend these.

rating 5.0. Would highly recommend! One of the best compression socks I've used so far. I also own Physix compression socks for work and I find these make my legs feel so much better. Would definitely recommend these to healthcare workers and weightlifters!

rating 5.0. Not a gimmick but a really nice running accesory. This was my first venture into these types of socks. My feet did not start comfortable in my shoes and fitting too snug at the end of my run due to swelling like they usually do. This was simply a more comfortable way to run and I may need to think about investing in a few more pairs. Also the company kindly sends care instructions for this item via email when you order it.

rating 5.0. It IS small, but.... ...I happen to have a third piercing that falls just even with the lower part of the thick cartiledge of my ear I think it's called the tragus - so this little dragon does fit me.  I knew it was for the left ear where I have that higher piercing so for the price gave it a shot.  It's prettier than in the picture (looks more gold) and really is lovely.  It does not fit perfectly over the top of my ears(I am 47 years old - I understand our ears keep growing with age - lol), however I normally wear headscarves that just wrap the top of my ears.  You don't see the wing that way, but his head pokes out.  My other thought would be to try some eyelash adhesive to keep it from slipping off if I wasn't wearing a scarf.  Otherwise it is not too heavy and almost don't feel I am wearing it.  Finally it isn't quite anatomically correct as it pulls the top of the ear forward, but I couldn't bear to give it four stars as I personally love it and will wear it.  Shipping was also fairly fast.  Will purchase from this seller again.

Very cute ring for a cat lover (we have 4 cats that live in doors and now a feral beautiful cat has had 5 kittens under our house and we are caring for them as best we can).
The person that I bought it from shipped it quickly and no problems there at all! Would definitely recommend unless you have extremely small fingers and nobody to adjust it for you!

rating 5.0. I was skeptical, and very pleasantly surprised! I am VERY picky about jeans. I'm 5'5", around 154lbs or so. I wear anywhere between a 10 and a 12. Everything that fits my hips and butt ends up being way too long. I went and looked up PajamaJeans' size chart elsewhere on the internet, and bought based on my measurements in accordance with their chart. I bought these in Large, and while I do have to roll them up one half flip, they are otherwise absolutely perfect. They sit maybe an inch or 1.5" below my belly button, but I have zero problems with my little leftover mom belly in these. They're pretty freaking amazing, and they look great. They're super comfortable.

I was skeptical. Like really, really skeptical. But I agree with other reviewers: I kind of don't want to ever wear regular jeans again.

rating 5.0. will probably order a 2nd pair They're not as thick as the lee knit jeans which is a good thing. The fabric is more like a real jean with a slight knit to it; undetectable as far as not being *real jeans*. The pink tie is a little strange at first but better than dealing with zippers. Good length maybe 31ish. For me, perfect w a cowboy boot. Got scared reading they got all  linty. Washed inside out came out perfect; I doubt it would have been a problem rightside out. Maybe the lint filter needed to be changed or something that sheds got mixed in or maybe that happens after a few washings? Hope not! Only complaint is I'd prefer the hem to be more like a levi hem not around 1 inch then you see that yellow stitching. It not too too thick but def better if other way. Overall very comfortable and not bad looking. Had a feeling the large would fit more like a medium glad I went up 1 size. Also, would like to add the vintage wash gives it a more modern look.

rating 5.0. These travel/support socks are excellent. I think it is very rare that a ... These travel/support socks are excellent. I think it is very rare that a product actually exceeds your expectations but this product has exceeded my expectations. I make quite a few long haul airplane trips (15-18 hours in the air) and my doctor wanted me to try support socks/stockings that would help prevent blood clots and relieve the constant swelling in my lower legs and ankles. I had tried several different kinds and brands. I had purchased the support socks in every place from a drug store to a home medical supply, Inexpensive to expensive. None of those products seemed to meet my needs exactly. I found the Wanderlust Travel Socks at Amazon and after wearing them half a dozen times my search is over. The socks are great! They provide wonderful support and when I wear them they completely eliminate the swelling in my legs and ankles. I now own 3 pair and I plan to purchase 3 more as I now wear them everyday, all day. What a difference they have made and as a bonus they actually look like normal dress socks. So double the benefit. I would highly recommend these socks for anyone looking for such a product.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Excellent for travel and compression generally.  Much more comfortable than other comparable products.

These would be a better value at a lower cost.

rating 4.0. Very comfortable, size and color slightly different than appearance in ... Very comfortable, size and color slightly different than appearance in the description.
Although this item doesn't specify a size, as a one-size-fits all for swimsuit coverup, it came packaged with a sticker stating it was size Large. Personally, I find it runs a bit oversized, although the material is very comfortable and lightweight. I plan to use more so as a comfortable loungewear during vacation in a hot climate.
The color is also slightly different than the description photo as the blues are slightly more muted. The seams are nicely completed though and the sleeves are a batwing style. I am 5'7" and the length reaches down to my ankles.
Overall, a nice casual coverup and multi-use item. This can easily be thrown into a suitcase without worry about taking up space or wrinkling.
Item came to me shipped earlier than expected which was appreciated.
This item was purchased at a discounted rate in exchange for my unbiased opinion and review.

rating 3.0. No shape It's pretty, but has a very strange fit.  It's wide and flat- no shape, just two rectangle pieces of fabric sewn together at the seams. I think I could have made this myself! rating 4.0. The material is great for summers The material is great for summers, the design is nice but blue in the dress is nothing like picture. That being the main reason I bought this I am disappointed in the product.

rating 5.0. Super cute for the pool! I am reviewing the Akery Women's Chiffon Robe Beach Coverup.  First off, let me say, the print is so cute!  It has a tribal feel to it that I just love.  The dark and light blues and oranges are great together.  The product looks just like the picture shows, so no surprise there.  The construction and design is super simple, but sewn together nicely.  The edges have been serged on the sides and folded over and stitched around the neckline, which leads to its comfort -- no scratchy edges.  Not sure what the fabric is, but reminds me of a chiffon - lightweight and sheer throughout.  This will be so cute to throw on as a coverup to run to the pool or beach.  I am quite tall and do have larger hips, so it did get a little tight on the upper thigh and over the booty, but I think it is still ok to throw on for the pool.  It looks fantastic on my tall daughter with her athletic build.  Girly, feminine with a bit of funk - I really like this.  *Disclaimer, I received this product at a discounted price for my honest review.

I don't know when the last time I owned a piece of clothing that THAT has happened.
It's so comfortable for every day wear, yet so easy to dress up with the change of a pair of flip-flops to heels and the addition of long necklaces and bangle bracelets if you want to wear it out on the town. Looks super cute over tights or skinny jeans. It's not cotton, so it hasn't faded with washing and because of the looseness of the fabric, doesn't make you hot that you're wearing a poly blend. It also doesn't make me feel or look like a cow wearing a moo-moo. SCORE! I normally wear a 16-18 in a dress but bought the 3XL so I could wear it off the shoulder. It's not as off the shoulder as I'd like but definitely can be worn that way.

rating 5.0. Love This Cloth I really thought I was going to have to say goodbye to a few pieces of costume jewelry I own -- this cloth put the life back into them.  Great product!!

rating 5.0. I wasn't convinced by the reviews Sometimes, when I look up a product online and the reviews are all raving about it, I figure that the reviews are mostly from people who work for the company or something like that. Honestly, this product had that ring to me - the reviews were all so positive, I thought for sure they were all fake. I bought it anyway because I'm very comfortable with Amazon customer service & return policy.

I had some jewelry that needed polishing. Some is sterling silver dipped in rhodium, some is gold. I didn't want to buy many different cleaners and thought that this might have a chance to be a one stop shop.

The day it came, I pulled it out and laughed - it looked like just a regular microfiber dust rag. Then I used it. In a matter of 10 seconds, the ring I used it on was shiny again. Wow. I was really excited by that. Then I tried it on a few other pieces - all were sparkling in a matter of seconds. I was seriously amazed.

So. Whenever I get really excited about a product, I think about all the other ways that I might be able to use it. Then it hit me. Last week was my anniversary with my husband and we drank a glass of champagne out of the toasting flutes from our wedding to celebrate. My husband washed them afterward but didn't dry them... The stems are made from silver. When I woke up in the morning, I found our toasting flutes to be horrifying - I actually cried. I thought they were ruined forever because the silver was all yellowed and horrible.

This morning, I got the idea to try this rag out on the stems. I kid you not, in about 2 minutes of scrubbing with the rag (they were horrible), my toasting flutes looked almost brand new again. There are a few spots that probably wont be able to be fixed because it seems like the silver kind of got almost burnt off.. but seriously, the glasses are silver again and they're beautiful. The rag on the other hand.. it's totally black from this big project. But for only a few dollars, I'll happily buy another one to use on my jewely. For only a few dollars, this cloth saved my irreplacable toasting flutes.

If you're looking for something to polish your jewelry, this is a great, perfect product - I'll be using it forever. If you're now thinking about all the other things you can use it to polish, I do suggest buying a few clothes at the same time because big projects ruin it kind of fast. However, it was worth every single penny. I couldn't be happier.

rating 2.0. Not for Opals or Soft stones Bought this specifically to clean silver jewelry with opals  ... & was very disappointed to see that the instruction note that comes with the cloth says not to use it for that purpose.  It may work ok, but was not what I bought it for.  Very disappointed.

rating 5.0. SILVER RETURNS TO SILVER! THIS CLOTH GOT ME AWAY FROM THE LIQUID CLEANERS THAT GET VERY MESSY. I HAVE A LOT OF SILVER JEWELRY AND WITH THE LIGUID IT TOOK ANYWHERE FROM 45 minutes TO 1hr & 15minutes
AND THE ITEMS SEEM TO COME OUT CLEANER AND BRIGHTER. I RECCOMEND THIS PRODUCT VERY HIGHLY!

rating 4.0. Great polishing cloth I asked my husband to guy this for me since I had a ton of sterling silver jewelry that was tarnished and I never wore anymore.  It is a great cloth, easy to use and took the tarnish off no problem.  I even had a pair of earrings that were BLACK with tarnish.  It does seem that it works differently on different items that are sterling though.  Some of my pieces I cannot buff to as high a shine as others but this cloth helped me discover a whole lot of my jewelry that I thought I was not going to wear again.
rating 2.0. i wouldnt risk it they are always dried out = don't work worth a poop

rating 5.0. Good Product I own a lot of silver jewelry and this product has been the best so far to remove the tarnish. I had this silver beaded bracelet that was almost black, any time I would clean it with other "silver" jewelry cleaner it would become dark in a matter of weeks. Since I've had this product I have only needed to clean it once... and it's been about 3 or 4 months.

It does however, leave your fingers dirty but you can easily wash it off. I also received many uses out of the cloth.

rating 5.0. Very Effective Easily removes tarnish and restores shine and luster to jewelry, particularly costume.  I've used it on several pieces of jewelry, and have found it to be very effective.  The dual sided cleaning cloth is particularly appealing, since one side cleans and the other polishes.  Highly recommended.

rating 2.0. A bit of a scam.... This cloth is advertised as being 12" x 15".....it is two smaller pieces of cloth sewn together in the middle.  I had planned to use this cloth as a drawer liner for my silver jewelry, which of course won't work with a big seam down the middle.  So, beware.  It does polish, though not spectacularly.  I'd look for a better cloth.

rating 5.0. Shine ALL the things! I used to have a cloth like this years ago but for a while had trouble finding them. This one worked beautifully on my sterling silver earrings, just as I expected it to. Assuming my photo went through, there's a before and after shot of the earrings so you can see what a difference it makes. For the wires, which are a bit delicate, I lay the wire against my finger and gently stroke it (in one direction) with the cloth. For filigree or other recessed spots, you can wrap the cleaning cloth loosely around the head of a soft-bristled tooth brush and "massage" the tarnish away. I like that there's a (white) cloth treated with the cleaning chemical and a separate (blue) cloth for buffing. I will definitely buy more of these when this one is used up.

rating 5.0. Great Price for a Great Polishing Cloth I originally got it to clean up a bronze torc that I have and wear regularly, which slowly tarnishes (and darkens) the finish. I wasn't even sure it would work, but from all that I read, I was fairly sure that it at least wouldn't damage it or scratch it up. Well, it not only worked, it worked fast and very well! It only took me about three minutes to have the torc shining like new again; very impressed! I went on to shine up a few pairs of silver earrings and rings that were in need, and again, quick, easy and beautiful!

The best part is that there is no mess like there is with the liquid cleaners, and the cleaning cloth is stitched to the polishing cloth so you always have them together.
rating 2.0. Sort of works, sometimes. I do not recommend. Silver foam and creams work MUCH better than this polishing cloth.

rating 5.0. Wonderful cloth This is an amazing product to use on any and all silver --- I'm not crazy about polishing silver and caring for my jewlery in general, but I went to Tiffany's recently to fix a bracelet and they gave me one of their polishing cloths and I noticed what a difference just wiping your silver with the cloth did, so when that one got tarnished I decided to give this cloth a try and I am so thrilled!

It's huge! Which is great, it lasts for a while, and its so easy to use and conveniently brings silver to a brilliant shine! I have bought it twice over the past year, and will continue to use it :)

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Nice, but not my style I bought 7 necklaces from this seller. How can you not when they are so cheap? All pieces arrived intact. I tweaked a few rough edges and closed a few jump rings, but nothing crazy. This piece is definitely not my style and I knew it was a risk when I ordered it.  Still gave it a high rating however, as there is nothing wrong with the actual piece. I may try to tweak it and make it more like something I would wear.  I am going to order more items from this seller.

rating 1.0. Shiny polyester This is such s cute cute sweatshirt hoodie. However, several problems, it's outside material is that of shiny black polyester not cotton in any way shape or form as described. The kind of polyester you saw in the sixties...the kind that snags. The kind that after you wear it and wash it you have to worry about the fabric balling up all over the outside. Guys save your money. If this was made from cotton and was breathable then it would be perfect. The fit is HUGE for a US medium (as we followed the size chart provided). I used a real US medium and layer over the top, enclosed are pictures. The size they sent says on it was an XXL. But we ordered an American medium. The hoodie has never been worn because I washed it before use and the cuff separated from the sleeve! Horriblely and cheaply made of polyester that balls up after washing. The buttons are made of plastic and could come off at any moment with a tug.

rating 5.0. ... received the tanks and was surprised the fit was perfect. So first I just received the tanks and was surprised the fit was perfect. So first, I'm 6'4' 230lbs. My chest is a bit saggy from being over weight for years as a child/young adult. I always wear tank under shirts for to reasons. 1. They cover up a bit of the saggy chest. 2. They absorb sweat. My chest size is 42'' and I like my under shirts to be a snug/tight fit. The under shirts I've been using are cotton and while they absorb sweat well they loosen up over time. I purchased these because they're compression tanks and hopefully won't stretch out, time will tell and I'll update if they do.

To the size. Their chart would've had me purchase the XL. Again I like my tanks snug so I took a flyer and went down a size to the L. They're perfect! Snug but not over snug and the best part for me anyways is, being tall I need them to be on the longer side and these are. No problems at all tucking them into my boxer briefs.

Being I just put the tank on 10 minutes ago I can't speak to the sweat issue our durability but I will update.

rating 2.0. Not a compression shirt I originally purchased the XL according to the chest size chart but after trying it on it was too big and very loose for a compression shirt.  I ended up returning them and went down to a large size instead which fits well, however,  the material is very thin and just feels like a regular moisture wicking shirt with no compression. I do not feel like returning it again so I will keep these to use as regular workout shirts.  Bottom line is do not buy these shirts if you are looking for compression unless you purchase 2 or 3 sizes smaller than your normal size. The material is great quality but the description is a little misleading.

rating 5.0. Perfect for Concealed Carry Undershirt These are great for me.  I conceal carry a handgun daily, and I needed a barrier between my skin and the pistol, and these work great.  I tried the traditional cotton "wife beater", but they were hot and uncomfortable, and always coming tucked.  These are so much better.  Like a second skin almost.  I normally wear a medium shirt, but the sizing said order a size up.  I ordered the large and they fit me just like expected, so make sure you order one size up if you are wanting your normal size.  So far I have reordered these three times, not because they fall apart, but I wear them daily.  Probably will order more when the time comes.

rating 5.0. Great feel, great price, and more... I am very happy... make that extremely satisfied with the product! They still retain their shape after 4 years (purchased 2017, currently January 2022)

It's at a great price and the material keeps you warmer in the fall and winter seasons than traditional 100% cotton tank tops. I used them (as a base layer) for a weekend camping trip without even a washing them initially... and they were extremely comfortable and noticeably more comfortable staying warmer. Even to sleep In on cool nights they beat traditional tank tops, hands down! They seem to line dry very quickly also.

Prior to these being my undergarments for my shirts, I was using the typical 100% cotton ribbed tank tops. The Neleus tank tops have no under the shirt tank top lines like the traditional hundred percent cotton old school wife beater tank tops. I purchase the black compression tank tops, and get tons more compliments on them than any traditional white tank top. Black compression t-shirts are the new sexy in my book!

I originally purchased a three pack, and subsequently ordered another 3 pack the very next week.

Please note, if you're trying to shoehorn into a "compression" tank top... because you're overweight or mildly obese... these aren't the ones that will control your out of control waistline... simply because there are other "girdle-like" compression shirts that will hold in a beer gut if that's what you're trying to control. I did buy one of those "other" uncomfortable and heavy controlled compression t-shirts that ended up looking like a bulletproof vest / tank top.

Neleus tank tops have a respectable yet minimal amount of compression and do a good job for doing what they are made for.

I was pleasantly surprised with the very affordable price, great fit, comfortable enough to sleep in... in addition to letting me look so much more stylish and sexy. This is by far the best clothing purchase I have made in the past several years!

Can't rave about it enough. Just do it, buy a 3 pack... it's that affordable.

rating 4.0. Not necessarily a compression tank top I wouldn’t necessarily call this a compression tank top.  The first set that I ordered was a double XL.  I normally fit into a large size shirt but I wanted a little bit of room in case the compression was too tight.  I tried on those first set and they were too large and fit more like a XL.  On the second order I ordered the large size even though it is recommended to order one size up.  The tank top is a good fit and does what it needs it to do but I definitely wouldn’t call it a compression shirt.  I also ordered all black based on some of the reviews and comparing them to the colored version that I ordered earlier are definitely of a thicker material.  Since I’m truly just going to use these tank tops when I work out or normal every day where as an undershirt the color wasn’t as important to me.  I believe if I ordered a ex L size which is one size up then when I normally would wear it would be too loose fitting.  I will be testing it out during workouts and normal workdays.

rating 3.0. Absolutely gorgeous coat...but 3 sizes too small This coat is absolutely gorgeous and well made, but it fits so small! I am 5'7", average build, average chest, and I wear a large in coats. After reading the reviews that said the coat ran small, I ordered an XXL (figuring it would fit, with room to spare). Nope, too tight in the arms, and the buttons couldn't even reach to close!

If I ordered an XXXXL, maybe it would have fit. Sizing is way off on this coat, so I would NOT recommend for ladies with a medium size or larger body frame. If you are a size zero, the XL may work for you.

I am in the process of returning the coat for a refund...I will put an update as to how smoothly that process goes as it was shipped from China.

UPDATE: Coat came from overseas, so they offered me 50% refund (which they quickly refunded). They said it would be too expensive to return and maybe I can give it too a friend. I accepted the 50% refund. Seller was very nice and responded quickly. If they sell something other than clothes, I would buy from them again, but I will not buy clothes as the sizes are way off.

rating 5.0. Fast shipping, runs small, ultimately fantastic if you order carefully! I ordered ths product just a week and a half ago and got it today (projected ship date was mid-May to beginning of June!! I got it 3 weeks early!). ordered an XXL due to customer reviews, and I am SO glad I did-- it's pretty snug and I'm lucky it fits the way it does. The coat is GORGEOUS-- a thick, wooly-feeling fabric, lined, as flattering as I hoped it would be. I'd say this coat would be a great spring, fall, and mild winter coat, but probably not for Minnesota sub zero temps for a freeze-baby like me. Milder climates could use this coat through the winter no problem.

As for the fit: I'm 5'9" and 180 lbs with fairly broad shoulders, normally a solid XL in coats. I ordered an XXL due to customer reviews, and I am SO glad I did-- it's pretty snug and I'm lucky it fits the way it does. The sleeves are great-- long enough for my long arms, and the hem hits almost knee length in the front-- I have long legs too. Slightly tight in the bust if I button it all the way to the shoulder. The hood is nice and deep.

Upon opening the package, my mom had to try it on and now I'm immediately ordering another for her. I was a bit skeptical due to some reviews, but personally I am so glad I ordered it. People WILL ask where you got this coat!!

(Ordered from Azbro on Amazon, not Rosegal or anything.)

rating 2.0. Not worth it. If you have boobs, then don't bother with this coat. It runs very small, and I went by their sizing chart. Also it will cost you half what you paid for the coat to return it to them to receive a refund. Cute design, but poorly made and not worth the time or money.

rating 5.0. Way too small! This coat is rather nice, if WAY too small.  The outside feels like a wool blend, and the liner is silky.  It seems to be made fairly well, and looks very similar to the picture.  It is very cute, but I can't wear it.  I ordered it 2 sizes too large (I am just over 5'4" and weigh about 160lbs) at a 2X Large, but once it finally arrived (it took over about a month to get here) I was heartbroken to find I can't wear it.  It is much too small. It was designed for a woman much more narrow across the shoulders and much smaller in the chest (I am a 36 DD).  While I can get the coat on, I can't close it over my chest, and I worry that if I reach for something too quickly I will split the back.  I will be giving this oh-so-cute-but-much-too-small coat to my little sister, hopefully she is petite enough to use it.

rating 5.0. 43 I am 5'6 and 170lbs and I wear C cup but to be honest a B 1/2 fits me best. Based on the reviews I bought a 2XL ... I got my coat today. No need its like it was made to fit me. The sleeves are a little long, if it bothers me I may have them taken down but no more than 1/2 an inch. I love it!!!

rating 1.0. Don't buy it Ordered it specifically for a cosplay, but also figured I could use it afterwards for the winter/fall. First, it was too small. I normally get a large or 1X, but decided to get a 2X because I read the reviews of it being too small, and figured going up a size would be enough. Well, I was wrong. It fits in my mid section, but not in my arms/shoulders (a problem I find I have often as a plus size woman in brands that claim to be all inclusive).

The second thing I found was that the holes for the buttons were too small. It took way too long to button just one of them.

Third, it started ripping almost immediately. Now, I know it's a size smaller than I anticipated, but upon inspection, it looks to be made of some really cheap material.

And finally, it also doesn't look much like the picture at all. Basically, don't buy this product. It's not worth the money. You're better off finding a better one elsewhere. I'm going to keep the jacket just because I need it for my cosplay in two days, and I don't have time to find another before then, but afterwards, I'm getting rid of it or using the material to make something else.

rating 2.0. Be aware! Not red I ordered these glasses for a school project. I needed the lenses, but they glued the damn things to the frame! Not to mention how they were sticking out of the frame. But I didn't care, as I wasn't going to be wearing it, I just needed the lens (which took ages to take out). But what bothered me the most is the lens color. It's NOT pure red as it's on the picture. It's got orange on it. And you definitely can't see through it like it's shown on the picture. They are reflective lenses. But all in all it works out even better for me! But I just wanted to you to be aware.

They probably ran out those red lens, now they are just gluing in lenses that are similar to it.

rating 1.0. Five dollars + shipping wasted I ordered these glasses because you never see red lenses in stores. The glasses are fine for cheap $5 aviators, it's the lenses that are the problem.

There is no way you could drive with these glasses on. None whatsoever. You'd get into an accident. They turn EVERYTHING RED. I mean, EVERYTHING. When you wear these glasses, you can perceive two colors: red and black. If you could find yourself a blue lens, you've got yourself a pair of 3d aviators. If you can't drive with them then what is the point?

They also hurt your eyes after a minute. I had two friends try them on to see if I was crazy. I was not. .

Avoid at all cost. They don't even look cool, and I own a bajillion pairs of aviators and rock them all. Not these though. Also, LOL at the name "Bradley Cooper" sunglasses.

rating 5.0. Yellow glasses work great! These are yellow lens glasses that are designed to fit over and rest on prescription glasses. If you don't wear prescription glasses, you can get plain glasses with yellow lenses. I couldn't decide, and they were cheap, so I got both the ClearVision HD and HD Night Vision glasses and used each for 1 week. They are pretty much the same except the HD Night Vision ones have matte black frames and the ClearVision HD ones have gloss black frames. This review will apply equally to both. About the frames, both are bulky and obstruct peripheral vision. The yellow lenses are great if you have the kind of night blindness that is common in people with light colored eyes. I learned about yellow lenses from a friend with light blue eyes who has the same sort of night vision problems I have. I had a friend with brown eyes try these, and she noticed no difference or improvement in her vision. With these glasses on, at night I have less glare and improved depth perception, and there is greater contrast between different objects so I can see what is around me more clearly. My night vision is better, but vision in low light situations (fog, heavy clouds, etc.) is improved even more significantly. When it's semi dark, I can see in color with these on, but without them it's pretty much just shades of gray; these glasses make it much easier to tell one object from another, and how far away they are. These are not "night vision" glasses -- they won't enable you to see in the dark -- but they will probably improve your night vision if you have this sort of night blindness.

rating 4.0. Good, But Not As Effective As Cataract Surgery The ClearVision HD Night Optics do, actually, what they are designed to do: Block the blue color spectrum. Doing this should improve night vision for people that are bothered by the glare. They do improve night vision slightly and they do remove a bit of the glare...but, that is about all you can expect from a five dollar purchase. Need to really clear up your glare problem? Try cataract surgery.

I wore these glasses while taking my grandkids to a place of amusement. Forgetting I had them on I walked into a room where the kids were jumping in a bouncy house. I was shocked to see they were playing in near total darkness...I could only see occasional flickers of someone running by me. I took off the glasses to discover the room was lighted completely by ultraviolet lights. So, yes, they DO block the blue part of the color spectrum quite efficiently.

rating 5.0. Very impressed!! IMPRESSED!
I usually only take the time to write reviews if I have a strong opinion about the product. I just got these in today so I can't speak for durability, beyond that they appear and feel to be sturdy. But I have to say I am highly impressed with these for the following reasons:

Shape - Most aviators geared toward females now have a shorter, more rounded shape to the frame. I don't care for this shape on my face, and am always on the hunt for an aviator closer to the classic shape (bonus if they're gold, and I purchased the gold-pink!!! 😁😁😁)

Packaging - this products was VERY well-packaged upon arrival. Furthermore, it came with a soft pouch to carry, a hard zipper-case (ideal for me who carries sunglasses in my purse), a cleaning cloth, and a tiny repair screwdriver!! LOVE this.

Price - no explanation needed, I spend this amount on much more cheap-appearance glasses

I will most definitely return to amazon immediately and purchase a few more of these - will edit if needed!

rating 5.0. Good for nurses, good for runners I got these because I am a nurse and clinical instructor, so on days I work I am constantly on the move. Even with good shoes, my feet and legs were still tired. I thought I might as well try these. Wow! My feet and legs weren't tired after a shift, enough that I felt able to go for a run (I didn't though).
I decided to try them on a fast 5K, to see how they would help. Normally my legs feel tired and heavy after a run like that, but they actually feel pretty good, enough that I could go for another run (I won't, it's too hot). Surprisingly, while the rest of my body is pouring sweat, my legs and feet feel cool (highly unusual, normally I like to take off my shoes and socks asap because they get so hot). Also, maybe it was the socks, but I put up a really good time and pace-I could feel the spring in my legs more than usual!
I have only one complaint: these only come in black/grey color. I would love to have a couple of additional pairs in neon colors for running. Even with that, I plan on ordering at least one more pair.
