rating 3.0. I really liked the design of this purse I really liked the design of this purse. The pockets are fantastic and functionally it WAS on par with some of my $100+ Bagallini purses--for about two weeks. I initially got this as a cheap accessory to match a dress I was wearing to a friend's wedding but liked it so much that it became my main purse. The problem is, it's a cheap purse. After just a few weeks, the inner lining separating the outside zipper pocket from the innermost body of the purse tore, combining the two compartments. It's still usable, and I like the purse enough that I'm going to see if I can repair it somehow, but the fact remains it's a cheap purse that couldn't withstand daily use.

rating 5.0. I really love this purse and am thinking about buying one for ... I really love this purse and am thinking about buying one for my daughter-in-law's birthday. I live in New York City where I go everywhere by train and I was looking for a not obscenely large purse that would hold all the things most women can carry in their car. This one is absolutely perfect for my everyday needs. It has six zipper pockets: four on the outside and two on the inside, so I can keep my metro card, keys, and phone separate and safe. Inside, I can fit my wallet, makeup pouch, hair brush, pens, tissues, snacks, book (to read on the train), and all the other ridiculous stuff I tend to accumulate, plus anything I might have to buy when I'm out (like aspirin, whiteout, notepad...whatever). With all those contents, this purse still holds its shape. It is not dressy but would certainly be fine for work or an informal event.

rating 5.0. Unbeatable Value and Soo Beautiful!! I bought these earrings along with the sterling silver pair. I gave the gold pair as a gift and kept the silver pair for myself. rating 5.0. Perfect Ok. For the amount of money I spent on these earrings, these earrings are great! They came in a little velvet pouch and were just as described.

I've worn them a week straight now and so far no peeling or color change. The cz stone is shiny and clear--not cloudy. Definately well worth the money!

rating 5.0. Beautiful earrings, unbeatable price! Granted, I probably got these earrings on sale. I've never spent less on a piece of jewelry! One penny! There were shipping chargers of course, but they were reasonable. Shipping was fast and they arrived whole and safely.

The earrings themselves are beautiful, full of fire and sparkle, nicely set in the stud to afford the most view of the stone. The gold plating on the stud is rich and yellow, just what I wanted! The back attaches securely and fits tight over the prong. This appears to be a quality crafted piece and I think they will last a long, long time.

I plan on wearing these in my wedding this month, but they are not too gaudy or over-the-top for everyday wear, either. In fact, I might wear them to work today!

rating 2.0. Not the dress that was advertised...... UPDATED***

ZANZEA Women's One Off Shoulder Striped Irregular Long Maxi Dress Loose Kaftan.

I Purchase this dress Because I it looked really nice on the person wearing it in the photo. When I received this dress a few days ago, I was really disappointed.

I wear size a 16 and XL-2XL is shirts. I thought this dress would fit great but I was totally wrong. This dress was way bigger then it was doscribed. I honestly thought that this dress would look just like the photo. But, the Neckline looked more like an oval shape and the dress does not come off the shoulders just like it was shown in the photo. In the photo the slits looked like it was more in the front but on the dress I received its on the sides. This "Irregular" shaped dress is not Irregular and has no shape at all to it. Being a plus size girl I look for clothing that will make me look nice. This dress does the opposite of making me look nice. I really thought this would be a sexy dress, even my husband did not like this dress on me.

PROS:
Lightweight feeling.
Soft and comfy material.

CONS:
Too thin of a fabric.
Not a sexy dress at all.
Way bigger than I thought.
Not an Irregular shape dress.
The slit is on both sides not in the front.
The Neckline does not come off the should.

***Please let me know why you do not believe my review is not helpful? Please do not click not helpful if you are just doing it to do it***

Over ALL, I do not recommend this ZANZEA Women's One Off Shoulder Striped Irregular Long Maxi Dress Loose Kaftan because It does not resemble the dress the model is modeling in the photo and does not look sexy at all. The dress looks more like a night gown for an older women, not something a younger women would wear.

current_product_reviews: rating 3.0. Torn Between 3 Stars and 2 I ordered 2 of these, one in XL and one in 2X. I am 5'4" and 163 lbs. I usually wear a large in tops. My first impression was disappointment, as the dresses I received (except for the stripes) look nothing like the one the model is wearing in the photograph here on Amazon. They are cut strangely and rather than slits on the sides, they have these huge, almost silly-looking U-shape cutouts. They have ordinary boat necklines, and if your shoulders aren't too broad, you'll be able to pull it down off a shoulder, but unless you're truly tiny, it will not hang way off the shoulder like it does on the model. The XL fit me well and looked slenderizing on me. The 2X did have a little extra fabric, and was baggier and less slenderizing on me than the XL. I gave it to a relative who is about 40 lbs heavier than me, and she fit it, although it doesn't really hang off her shoulder. I noticed that both the XL and the 2X have exactly the same size neck opening. I also noticed some sloppy stitching and broken threads. Only because of the very reasonable price, did I decide to keep it and wear it around the house. I may even get a couple more, (at this low price), because they do make nice house dresses and the fabric feels soft and comfortable.
other_product_reviews: rating 4.0. Nice, But Could Be Better I wear a size 14 at 5'4" tall. The largest size, which is supposed to be a US 18, fit me perfectly. The color is nice and the poncho itself is flattering and hides figure flaws. I only wish that the material was thicker and of better quality, and that it came in more colors.

rating 5.0. Hate Hand washing? Don't despair! I look and feel like a million bucks in this dress. It's slenderizing, it hides all figure flaws and it's light as air and comfortable, even on the hottest summer day. The design is unique and beautiful and I get compliments on this, and every other Sakkas dress I own. I'm a mother of four, normally a size large; 5'4" tall and 163 lbs. The dress is PERFECT on me. It's very roomy and would fit a woman with very large hips. If you love your Sakkas dresses, they will love you back. They are high maintenance, requiring hand washing to preserve the delicate embroidery and the colors usually bleed during the first 1-3 washes. Personally, I don't have the time or patience for actual hand washing, so I place each dress (one at a time) into my washing machine with a soft, flat bed sheet. Using the lowest water level, the most gentle setting on my machine ("Hand Wash Plus - Fine Delicates") and the shorter ("Permanent Press") wash cycle, I have had the dresses come out of the wash each time with no damage. I use a small amount of regular liquid laundry detergent, but I do not use fabric softener, which can weaken some fabrics over time. These garments must be hung up to air dry - putting them in the dryer will shrink and ruin them.

All pieces arrived intact. I tweaked a few rough edges and closed a few jump rings, but nothing crazy. This piece lays very well. I was nervous that the pieces would bunch up or lie over one another, but thankfully that is not the case. This is definitely a piece I will get a lot of use out of. rating 5.0. Best copper one This is the third brand o copper mask that I’ve purchased and it fits the best by far! Clips around the nose to avoid glasses fogging, comfortable on the ears, and molds around the chin.  The shape sits the mask away from the nose so you breathe a little better.  Too big for my petite teen daughter, just right for those  of us in the 150-200 lb range.  I’m buying more!

rating 4.0. Time will tell if the Copper Compression mask is effective I cannot evaluate the antibacterial/antiviral efficacy of these masks and am hoping the manufacturer is being honest. Research does indicate copper effectively kills viruses and bacteria. And let’s be honest, it better than nothing.

I wear these everywhere, including intense intense workouts. Yes, they are a little small and do pull up at the chin and down on the nose. The masks are a little stiff and this creates small gaps on the sides. These facts lessen my confidence in the mask’s ability to effectively filter incoming and outgoing air.

While working out, it does inhibit breathing to some degree. Sides of the mask move in and out with heavy breathing. This makes me more confident air is being filtered! I like the extra challenge and feel like I’m getting a little more respiratory conditioning.

The adjustable elastic ear loops are a little uncomfortable when tight.
rating 5.0. Comfortable and breathable Like the fabric and the fact that it is adjustable. Doesn’t make me feel like I can’t breathe!

rating 3.0. Not sure about this one The 2 masks are a very nice looking light grey color. The material on the outside and inside is very soft but there is something very stiff about them. I’m not sure if it’s the material between the 2 layers or what but even after washing twice it’s still stiff.
The masks had a terrible smell, like vinegar when I opened the package. After the first wash the smell was almost gone, and after the 2nd it’s no longer noticeable to me.
The mask sits just below your chin (I’m averaged size) so it feels a little small to me but my other masks I own are shaped bigger so that might be why. There is a adjustable nose wire and ear loops to help tighten the mask. I noticed that when I tighten it the mask tents out further away from my face, making it look weird.
I’m not sure what the copper compression is all about, I don’t notice anything different.
All in all it will be a good back up mask to keep in the car but not my daily choice.
rating 1.0. Small size Masks are very small size even for a woman.  Difficult to breath.

rating 5.0. Best Mask Forget all the debate, if I have to wear one, this is the only one I can wear! I can breathe. It's comfortable and even though I still have limits in wearing time, I can comfortably shop longer and not have my brain ramping into the panic zone.

rating 5.0. Most Comfortable Reusable Fabric Masks So Far I LOVE these masks. I’ve tried a range or cotton fabric ones and these are by far the best. 4 layer protection, but feels super light and breathable. Mask fits my face nicely without gaps, adjustable non-elastic Earloops for all day comfort. The mask fabric is smooth and has enough stiffness it holds its shape when I breath and stands away from my mouth. Just perfect! Will be ordering more. Not sure how much the copper works, but every bit helps on a very well designed mask.

The surgical masks and other masks with elastic earloops irritate behind my ears after a few hours and the constant pulling gives me a headache by the end of the day. But l love how breathable the surgical masks are (no fogging of glasses).

I tried several different brands of reusable cotton masks. The 1-2 layer ones just feel very flimsy and not sure they do much to block germs. Some of the thicker cotton ones are just too thick and feel suffocating. I found a few others with wicking/tech fabrics, but those materials are almost too soft, the mask either sticks to my face or when I breathe, the mask then suction to my cheeks, very annoying.

These literally are the best reusable masks I’ve tried!

rating 2.0. Nice materials, bad clasp, and can not be resized. I got this band to use with my Samsung gear S3 Frontier smart watch. 22mm fits exactly right.

This is one of my favorite clasp designs out there. It's very secure and can be done/undone with one hand. I've had several watches that use it and I've always liked it. However, this clasp mechanism is not the best. It clasps but only with some work. The more narrow securing clasp also takes a lot of work get latched. So you have to work too much at getting it latched, IMHO, and it's frustrating.

Also keep in mind that you have to get the spring bars separately. Don't get the quick release kind that have a nob on the side, you have to get the standard ones that are completely straight.

UPDATE: The "links" are not individual chain links. They are steal wire that are looped within each other. When I went to cut a couple of the rows off of each side to make it fit I saw that the whole thing was coming undone. So ... you can not cut rows of the chain off without ruining the entire watch band.

In summary: Bad quality clasp and it can not be resized.

I would have made them a bit less square and bulky, but that can be handy too. When I want them to lay flat (not in use) I can just use the MOLLE spot next door to put the hook/latch in. No worries.

rating 5.0. I brought 4 dresses on a cruise but I just wore this one every day instead. This dress is soooo comfy and soooo cute. It is a thinner fabric but not sheer, it's just perfect for hot summer weather when you just can't bear the thought of putting on pants. The straps are adjustable which was great for me, I could shorten them all the way and make a nice midi-length beach dress, or let the straps out all the way and make an almost-floorlength dress for walking around the deck on my cruise. When I let the straps all the way out it was very low cut though so I did wear a sports bra underneath for more coverage. I could have easily dressed this up with a shawl or scarf and nice shoes, but it looked great with sandals or beachy flip-flips as well. Overall it is the purchase I am happiest about in preparation for my cruise and I might just purchase 4 more just like it for my next cruise. I just wish it came in a 100 colors so I never had to wear anything else!

rating 2.0. quality reflects price; sizing is supremely off. Definitely the quality you pay for: this "suit" is not meant for busty women. I ordered a size large, I'm a 36D, I'm 5"6 and weigh about 170 lbs so I'm very too heavy and curvy with a big bottom as well. The bottoms (black) fit like a dream! The quality sucks, don't get me wrong, you get what you pay for, BUT the black bottoms did look like the photo: almost fit like a shape wear type of bottom which works wonders on my hourglass figure. If you don't mind paying the price, the bottoms are worth it I'm keeping them and buying a top to match with it later. Now the top was, as everyone else describes, a hassle. Even if I had sized up it would've been unfair since the bottoms wouldn't have fit well so what's the point? Putting the top on was impossibly hard and really hurt my skin and my breasts, it didn't fit at all whatsoever anyway you put it. It has 5% spandex but isn't very stretchy at all. I literally had to grab a pair of scissors and physically cut myself out of it because I couldn't get it off without damaging and hurting my skin from the pulling and yanking. All in all, if you're petite and slender and relatively straight sized this will work for you; if NOT, then please read these reviews before making your purchase. I wouldn't purchase this again.

rating 3.0. They seem to be pretty good so far I am disabled and wear this style of slipper pretty much all day, every day. I need something that is flexible and non-slip. I've tried for warmer bootie style slippers in the winter, but so far they have all let my feet slide around in them, either out of the package or after a very short time.
So these are my every day shoes, and I don't expect them to last a long time.

First Impressions since I just got them today:

I've been buying [[ASIN:B00B04VBQ2 Snoozies Womand Cozy Slippers Brights Collection (chevron stripes, large)]] and other Snoozies at twice the price. So when I needed new ones I gave in to the temptation to buy 4 pairs for the price of 2. Out of the package they look very similar. There is a little more loose fuzz, but otherwise these are very much like the Snoozies.

I got the L/XL for my 10 1/2-11 extra wide feet, and these appear to be a little snug out of the package, but this is good. My experience with this style of slipper is that they do stretch. These might be a little too loose for a size ten.

I immediately tested out the non-slip dots on the wickedly slippery laminate floor that came with the house, and they definitely don't slide or slip. I am hoping that the dot style of non-slip on the bottoms will last longer than the strips or printing on others that I've had.

I do wish that the pink bows on the blue/yellow polka-dot pair had been sown on instead of glued, but they are glued so thoroughly that I'll have to live with it for now. With any luck they'll come off in the wash.

And speaking of wash, these are officially hand wash, cool water, air dry. As are most "washable" slippers. And as usual, I'll completely ignore that and put them in with the rest of the wash. I know that this means that they will wear out sooner, and is probably the reason that the non-slip bits on my slippers always get brittle, but I just don't hand wash anything. I do have a front load washer which seems to treat things much better than a top loader.

If these fall apart soon, or stretch too much, I'll come back and edit this review.

08/08/16
- The pile on the fabric is matting down inside and doesn't recover after washing.
- The cut of these is a little different than the Snoozies, and they seem to come off a little more easily.

rating 4.0. Very Nice slim wallet. This is a very nice RFID wallet. The material is good quality, the gold colored zipper slides easily around the length of the wallet. There are plenty credit card slots to hold cards, drivers license and insurance cards. There are pockets on either side of the interior of the wallet for paper money or receipts and a zippered coin holder in the center of the wallet. I appreciate the slim design of the wallet. This is not a checkbook wallet and you will not be able to overstuff the item without losing some of the function of the slim design. I does come with a removable wrist strap to use the wallet as a wristlet. The material is a little stiff because it is a new wallet but I know it will soften with wear. Over all an excellent purchase and looking forward to many years of quality use from the wallet.

(**just one point for those that are looking to downsize to a small/mini bag or small cross body handbag this wallet will not fit into your handbag with comproming the position and safety of your wallet.)

rating 5.0. Nice purse. Good size plenty of room. Nice wallet. Good size. Fits my IPhone 6 Plus with my speck case which is a little on the larger side. Good quality, not cheaply made. Plenty of slots for cards, ID and cash. The wristlet it comes with adds a nice touch.

I took this wristlet on trip to Cancun and let me just say I didn't have to pack a bulky purse on top of a carry on bag which made my trip A little more comfy. This little purse slipped right into my carry on making it easy to remove when needed. It held my cash, cards, cell phone, two passports and airline tickets nicely. Easy to get to all our important documents as we went through checkpoints and then easy to tuck away.

Overall very happy with my purchase.

rating 4.0. Love it, but experienced the chem smell others have complained about I would have given this wallet 5 stays but the glaring complaint I got from the comments was about chemical smell. Mine however did not come with a little deodorizer package and reeked of a nasty chemical smell.

I do absolutely love the wallet though! It's perfect size, fits my iphone 6s perfectly and has enough room for all of my cards! One of my slots on the left side is oddly loose however, and the card keeps falling out, but the others are fine.

Would definitely recommend, but maybe inquire prior to purchase about the chemical smell and what/if they're doing anything to remedy it.

input: rating 4.0. Just as they say they are Gave a 4 star simply because, though they are nicer, in the sense that they are perfect in shape and size when compared to the clear "glass" pebbles bought at the craft store, they are pretty spendy for that slight difference. They do do a nice job magnifying the image below. The diamond glaze works really well with them. They are lighter in weight compared to the glass pebble ones. They seem more plastic-resin than glass, as they aren't very easy to clean to get the finger prints and package dust off. Another reason for lack of 5-stars. They were quite dirty for a new package of product.

rating 5.0. Perfect for making magnets! I used these clear glass dome for making magnets as a baby shower gift. I bought 2 packs, and between them there was exactly one chipped circle, which I was happy with. I still ended up using it, since for my purpose you can't notice the chip anyway (I still have that magnet on my fridge). Otherwise, these tiles were perfectly clear and free of any obvious imperfections. They were all perfectly round and the same size, and flat on one side.

rating 5.0. Beautiful and nearly perfect. These are almost exactly an inch across. The dome is not super high but the glass is very clear with no bubbles. I made some awesome refrigerator magnets with these and I highly recommend them. I felt they were a good deal.

Follow up: I bought this for my daughter, and I had to take it in on the sides. Even though she had an ample bosom, the suit still gapped at the sides. With the tucks in place, the suit performed well in the ocean, sand, and sun. It is great for tummy control, but I don't recommend it for a smaller bust because of the gapping.

rating 2.0. Same side boob problem everyone else had I wanted to love this, I'm not sure how to rate this.... I read so many reviews and decided to take a chance, but unfortunately I had a lot of the same problems the others complained about. So, the suit itself is really nicely made and feels very sturdy. I ordered a large based on the reviews and I usually wear a 10/12. The problem was the chest part. While it pulled very hard on my shoulders the gap that was left by the 'side boob' was substantial. It was also pretty loose in the center where the keyhole part is. So it pulls tight on the shoulders and chest where it crosses and gives you no support everywhere else and makes you have pancake looking boobs. Also the seem where the chest part meets the shoulder straps hits right by your collar bone so it kinda looks like you're wearing your bathing suit wrong. I could see this working if you are very thin with a very large chest with breasts that are very high or perky, but for us every day women, it just doesn't cut it. Returned it and am trying a different style.

rating 5.0. Unique and Lovely I purchased this as an assessory to compliment the Cleopatra costume I am going to wear for Halloween.  I have already worn it without the costume however and it has been a joy.  Please note that the chain around the finger is larger than it seems in the photo.  My hands are quite slim, so the snake falls lower on me than the photograph, but only because the finger chain is too big.  It still looks good the way it fits me however, it is just a little harder to keep it in exact place (not a big deal).  Not everyone will have this problem, I think that the size of your hand matter.  However I do think it is important to keep in mind the large finger chain.  The wrist chain is adjustable and that helps to keep the bracelet snake from moving around.  At any rate, I am happy with my purchase given the price as it looks a more expensive than what I paid for it.  For your information, the snake eyes on my bracelet are black.  Green would have been even better, but I am happy I bought it and I will wear it often.

rating 5.0. Perfect for NONpierced ears! Beautiful. Elegant.

Exactly what you see is what you get. The roses are dainty yet not delicate and have small magnets on the back of the card that you use to have them hang on your ear. My daughters both got these and both of them love these.
The magnets on the back are small, but seem to work.
Tips:
Make sure hair is up and styled out of the way so that they do not get snagged on a stray piece and separate the magnets. Be careful, style fabulously. Anything metal can attract these magnets so be careful what goes into your styling and where it gets placed.

They love these and are a great alternative to the sticker earrings they have been styling before these.
One has a metal allergy. So far so good as she has not had any adverse reactions to the metal paint on these. She wears them a!!!s often as she can.
As a present they went over fabulously!!

Also, they arrived ahead of schedule. Always a plus! The seller Skyblue HK had them wrapped well and packaged properly. We will do business with them again if given the chance.
.

Again, they are lovely!!

They definitely have a cooling effect, thought it's not quite as noticeable anymore as when I first bought them. Yes, they do run, at least one of my sleeves did, but it is only slight cosmetic damage and does not ruin functionality.

These things looked small but stretch far enough to go from my wrists to my elbows. I do a lot of lifting and moving and they stay in place really well. Will likely buy another pair soon.

As a side note, being outside in the sun, these get hot pretty quickly. The cooling effect only happens when there is some amount of wind, or when I go inside.

rating 4.0. Pros and Pros and Cons (Updated) Please see original review below. This one I'm writing nearly 2 years later. For a $22 bag, it's pretty amazing. I've been looking to replace this bag for something more "elegant", but just can't find anything else that works as well. I am an over-packer. I take everything with me. Everything. I can fit my MacBook Air (13') in its case, along with a 33oz Camelbak Eddy, 26oz smoothie tumbler, and all my "daily" stuff (European wallet, 2 eyeglass cases, two "makeup" bags, checkbook, snack pack--I have a case for everything and everything in its case). On occasion, there are also books and/or files, then loose stuff (miscellaneous lady things -- mirror, lip balm, business cards, gum, mints, hand wipes, hand lotion, brush, clips and ties) which fits in the interior compartments, plus three sets of keys, two cell phones, and a partridge in a pear tree -- and a second "after hours" purse when needed. The bag has held all of that weight amazingly, even lugging it through the airport, hanging it from door hooks, carrying it by the arm straps and cross-body style. It is not perfect (see below), but it is a damn fine, rugged, lasting bag that has not been treated daintily. I wasn't thrilled at first, but I am very happy with this purchase in the long run.

Original Review: First, this is a bargain for a $22 bag. No doubt about that. However, my eyes are still watering from the odor it is emitting. The interior slots are too shallow for a phone or pens. Even the interior zippered pocket is tiny by any purse's standards. The middle pocket holds more, thankfully. The exterior zippered pocket is rather large -- just wish that was on the inside. The fact that the bottom is firm doesn't help when you have the bag over your shoulder either by the bag's handles or the larger strap. I would happily pay more for deeper slots and magnetic snap closures, which I think I will look into adding. The zipper closure is more of a gesture than anything else. It takes more effort to zip than snap and, from what I've seen so far, the zipper opens pretty easily on its own because it doesn't go from end to end. Snaps would have been a better design feature, or a hook latch, even it if upped the price.

Again, this is a great $22 bag. You really can't go wrong with it. And it was received very quickly on free/standard shipping, which is always appreciated. But it does fall short on the standards (pocket/slot depth, closures) that other large bags have, even at a lesser price. And, oh, that smell.

rating 5.0. I totally love the coffee shade of brown I chose but I ... I absolutely live my bag!!! I can't say enough. The color, style and quality far exceeded my expectations!  For 21$ I was expecting just a summer bag to last the season and tons of flaws. Wrong!  This bag will last years! It's strong, well made, thick canvas with tons of pockets, compartments and a zipper divide in the center. I totally love the coffee shade of brown I chose but I think any color would look good on this purse. The tapered bottom is what I love most, it's got style and shape unlike a lot of inexpensive purses. It's large, fits tons of items but doesn't feel bulky when wearing it.  It versitle in that you can wear shoulder straps or as a crossover. I've done both and love it both ways. These bags would make great gifts at this price. I've noticed their are different sellers selling it for double the price or more by putting their name on it. It's the same purse as this for half the price. Buy it with prime free shipping. I'm getting another in different color. Pair it with jeans and denim jacket and you get cute boho chic 😃

rating 1.0. Cheap Like Tin Cheap, Like Tin - Broke first time I tried it. The spring to open and close this bracelet is under your wrist. Requiring you separate the band under the turquoise stones. When I first opened the bracelet, it felt really light; kind of like tin; but a little heavier. I had hoped to give to my granddaughter and for this price worth a try; but after breaking my first try - there is no way.

As you can see in the picture below, the bracelet arrives looking as advertised. Putting it on is no problem; but when you go to take it off, separating the band and twist your wrist to get it out, the metal used to hold the stones is so thin it bent - see below pictures. I think a couple more bends and 2/3's of the stones will snap right off.

I will say the bracelet arrived sooner than the estimated delivery dates - it took 16 days to arrive as opposed to the 25- 44 days. This is so not worth it.

rating 1.0. 925 screw post cz earrings I got these earrings for only the cost of shipping.  Should have been my first clue.  They are beautiful and they really sparkle. The shipping was amazingly fast.  Based on appearance and delivery they are 5 stars.  The main reason I wanted these was for the screw post.  With most screw post earrings, the screw back pushes on, but screws off.  Once the screw back is pushed into place, it does not move unless you push it tighter.  After removing these earrings once from my ears, that was the end of the screw off capability.  The back slides like greased lightning.  The earrings look great when the back is pushed to my ear, but within seconds the back slides and the earring droops and is ready to fall off.

Overall the earring is nice but is the quality of the silver I am worried about.

rating 5.0. Quite Clever I have used the same junky carabiner for many years to hold my keys, primarily to make quick removal easy. However, it's easy for rings to fall off accidentally since there is no lock. This keychain solved all of my problems.

No more accidental removal of rings. The lock on this keychain is excellent. It's almost impossible to disengage on accident, and very easy to disengage on purpose.

No more fumbling around in my pocket. The length of this chain allows me to easily hook to a belt loop for easy access.

No more Chinese junk. This is made in Taiwan out of what appears to be much higher quality materials.

Others have mentioned it is easy to end up with an unwieldy glob of keys, but there are easy solutions. Stagger the groups of keys by attaching a secondary ring to the provided ring, remove unused keys, or buy a different large ring that is actually intended to be used for a large number of keys.

My only gripe would be the price. $20 seems pretty steep for a keychain. Nonetheless, I highly recommend this product.

UPDATE 2019-09-12:

I'm still using the same product I purchased years ago and it has held up wonderfully. I still love it and would buy it again.

UPDATE 2021-10-25:

The finish is a little scratched up but no rust and it still works perfectly. I even bought another one for my wife. This is the keychain I recommend to everyone who cares enough to ask.

rating 4.0. the little fastener things are very easy to attach and detach this product is as advertised. the little fastener things are very easy to attach and detach, so one can remove a particular key or set of keys to give to someone else, for example. thus far, the fasteners have shown no tendency to unsnap while i am in transit, which was something i had worried about.
it is hard to get the keys on the individual rings of the fasteners, but then it always is a struggle to get keys onto a key ring. the product is sturdy -- the chain could be just a bit heavier, but it is ok. the end that fastens to the circular part with the rings on it worries me just a bit, as i can see it breaking eventually, but it, too is ok. and the clip that attaches to one's belt loop or bag seems quite strong.
the chain is not as long as i would have liked, but that is my own fault. i assume that the length of the chain is mentioned in the product description, and i should have taken note of it. this is a problem when i have the clip fastened to my belt loop, as it is hard to bring my bike key low enough to lock my bike lock without stooping, and hard to bring the key to my building's front door high enough to unlock that lock without standing on my toes. if i fastened the clip to my bag instead of to my belt loop, this would not be a problem.

rating 5.0. If you don't want to lose your keys. Buy this one. Have purchased a few of these types of keychain's and this is the best one by far. (motorcycle key set, car key set, and work key set). The plastic one I picked up at the locksmith works well, but I wanted something classier. This was my 2nd purchase, and I can tell it will remain durable for years to come. The plastic one's problem is that the switch is already moving a bit loose as the plastic bends. The third I purchased more recently and has spurred me to write this review as I now appreciate it so much more than I already did. This one I've had for months and is still going strong, with only scuffs from normal use showing up on it's body. It does cost 3x's as much but I think I know why now. The cheap one I bought is coming apart after less than 2 weeks and I am dropping keys as I pull that other one out of my pocket and they fall out of the holder. This Sensi one shows no signs of that happening. I've never been concerned with losing keys. Though I did get it caught between my seat belt buckle and seat once. It still held up.

This Sensi company certainly makes a superior product.

When I am not driving the car keys go back easily onto the keychain. Hope its durable.

input: rating 5.0. I love to wear ear cuffs and this one has to ... I love to wear ear cuffs and this one has to be my favorite! It's so cute! When you get it, it looks small, but it will fit your ears! When I received the cuff, there was no damage, and nothing displeasing. The only thing is that the metal doesn't look as smooth as the picture shown. Overall, it's still worth the buy. Lucky Way puts the cuff in a cute box packaging which is very nice, instead of having the ear cuff wrapped in bubble wrap. Everything about this ear cuff is cute! It also cam in early, so that's a plus!

rating 2.0. Pass on this Peacock! Its okay, in my opinion the peacock looked kind of goofy and not much like a peacock at all up close (more like a swan and giraffe cross breed). The feather deatils is what makes this piece really standout. The rhinestones are so tiny you can't even tell they're there unless your up close. This is a standout piece for sure, i was just unimpressed with the overall quality. The fitting of this piece was not too good either, i had to make a few careful adjustments to get it to actually stay on my ear (which still didnt fit too securely). Be careful with adjusting this piece it is fragile and can easily be broken. The actual size of this ear piece is not that big either, but it's a suitable size for a look that won't appear too bulky.

rating 3.0. Wanted to love this, but its not what I expected I was really excited to get this ear cuff. Its beautiful, but not really what I was hoping for. For starters, when it arrived, two of the pink "feathers" fell off. Its an easy fix with glue, of course. The thing that I don't like about this, is that there is no security once its on your ear. There is no actual cuff, or anything to attach to your ear. You just slide it on, and fit your ear between the two long, curved pieces. I have long, thick hair and it often gets caught in earrings. I'm afraid that when it does get caught, piece will go flying off and break. Other than that, its not too heavy, its pretty, and its about the size of a palm.

rating 3.0. This cuff is very pretty. I am giving it only 3 stars because ... This cuff is very pretty.  I am giving it only 3 stars because I ordered this piece on two separate occasions.  The first one I ordered, two of the "feathers" popped off when touched.  The second one came with three feather stones already loose in the box.  I used modge podge to glue them back and it looks perfect but they should do a better job of gluing the stones on in the first place.

rating 5.0. My New Favorite Dress I LOVE this dress. I also get compliments on it every time I wear it.

I used the sizing chart and the dress fits perfectly. The dress has a side zipper which is great because I tend to struggle with back zippers. My arms never seem to be able to pull them up completely when they are behind my head so the side zipper is way more convenient. However, I don't need to use the zipper. The material is flexible enough for me to pull it over my head to put on which is great because sometimes I'm in a rush and just need to throw it on quick. I have worn this dress by itself as well as paired it with a black sweater/cardigan and it's super cute. I feel this dress can be dressed up for more formal events or dressed down for something more casual. I love the versatility of that.

It also has POCKETS. Which every female knows is a great bonus. The pockets easily held my phone without stretching the fabric or looking odd. I actually was able to put a 16 oz can of beer in the pocket! So not only does it have pockets it has pockets that are actually useful in size.

The dress is adorable and I plan on wearing it frequently throughout the summer. I would DEFINITELY recommend it.

rating 2.0. Beware the zipper. I read quite a few reviews about this dress prior to ordering. I'm surprised I didn't see a mention about the quality of the zipper. The dress is pretty and would have fit me... if I had someone else to help me zip it. The zipper is a flimsy dress zipper that goes from a few inches on the skirt to a few inches up the bodice. The fabrics are different, between the skirt and bodice. When I put the dress on, it fit great. I was able to get the zipper up to the "transition" part, where there is extra fabric underneath from where the skirt and bodice come together. I didn't have to stretch the fabric to make the zipper come together, but I needed to be able to hold the fabric together at the transition, pull the zipper, and still hold the fabric down at the bottom of the zipper in order for it to pull up. That would require 3 hands. Since I only have two, and there isn't always someone home to help me get dressed, I'm returning this dress. I'm 5'5", about 150-160 lbs. I wear small/medium tops and 6/8 in bottoms. The medium I ordered shouldn't have been so problematic. Like I said, it fit, but I feel like I should be able to dress myself alone at 45 years old. I thought about exchanging for a large, but then I'm afraid the bodice would be too big and the zipper still may give me problems, so it really isn't worth the hassle, unfortunately, as it's a beautiful dress.

rating 5.0. This dress is SUPER comfortable! I am currently buying more in a ... This dress is SUPER comfortable! I am currently buying more in a couple other colors. Its a true empire waist, and the bottom doesn't instantly poof out like many empire waist dresses (trust me, I have trouble finding clothes, as my hips stick out a bit, but this is very flattering even on my waistline!!) I got the white and black floral pattern, the only downside is the white is really light, so you will want a slip underneath it, or at least some nude colored undies. Pockets are kinda funky...however.. POCKETS! All in all, great price on a good dress. 5'6", 140, 34C, I ordered a medium and it was almost a little too big. Going to try out a small. Still a good fit though.

rating 5.0. Adds a Touch of Romance to a Casual or Dressed-Up Look I'm so glad I got this! Don't listen to the haters: this shirt fits beautifully. I'm typically a medium to a large in American sized shirts. Sometimes I tend to choose a large, to better accommodate my chest. I got this in a large and it's just so flattering for my figure. On the first day I wore this shirt, I got three compliments: on my way to work, at work, and during my lunch break-- all by other women! They loved the colors, the rose print, and feminine details like the puffed shoulders and the peplum feature. It has such a nice, romantic aesthetic that can be worn casually or dressed up for work. The material is so soft, too. I was a little worried that the puffed shoulders would be too unusual or too much, and one of the ladies said: "Not at all! It's the perfect amount of puff." The puffed shoulders are different from what I'm used to, but I knew what I was getting before it arrived. The product photos clearly show it has the puffed shoulders. Some of you may not like that, but I think it's worth a try. I got this shirt in the beige color, but plan to buy it in the other color very soon.

rating 5.0. Beautiful Simply amazing and SO soft. I'm on my way to order another one! These run just a tad in the large side. Order a size down if you like you're clothes fitted. Otherwise these are true to size (:

rating 5.0. Nice, comfortable shirt. Wish I ordered closer to my true size. I am really pleased with the shirt; I love the colour, the patterns, and the shape. I love how it flows away from my hips, and I think the little puffy shoulders are very cute. A very feminine shirt, very stretchy material and comfortable.

My only regret is that I ordered a size larger, and the shirt is pretty big on me. I am 5'6, 160 pounds, and have a 30 inch waist, but my shoulders and arms are fairly big. I was worried that it would be too constricting, so I ordered a size up. The material is very stretchy, so I regret not buying closer to my size. I normally wear a size 10-12, but ordered a size 14. Even though it is a bit big, it won't be a problem to take in, and it is still very flattering. I would recommend the shirt to others.

Decent, but seems like they could make a slightly better product pretty easily.

rating 3.0. They seem to be pretty good so far I am disabled and wear this style of slipper pretty much all day, every day. I need something that is flexible and non-slip. I've tried for warmer bootie style slippers in the winter, but so far they have all let my feet slide around in them, either out of the package or after a very short time.
So these are my every day shoes, and I don't expect them to last a long time.

First Impressions since I just got them today:

I've been buying [[ASIN:B00B04VBQ2 Snoozies Womand Cozy Slippers Brights Collection (chevron stripes, large)]] and other Snoozies at twice the price. So when I needed new ones I gave in to the temptation to buy 4 pairs for the price of 2. Out of the package they look very similar. There is a little more loose fuzz, but otherwise these are very much like the Snoozies.

I got the L/XL for my 10 1/2-11 extra wide feet, and these appear to be a little snug out of the package, but this is good. My experience with this style of slipper is that they do stretch. These might be a little too loose for a size ten.

I immediately tested out the non-slip dots on the wickedly slippery laminate floor that came with the house, and they definitely don't slide or slip. I am hoping that the dot style of non-slip on the bottoms will last longer than the strips or printing on others that I've had.

I do wish that the pink bows on the blue/yellow polka-dot pair had been sown on instead of glued, but they are glued so thoroughly that I'll have to live with it for now. With any luck they'll come off in the wash.

And speaking of wash, these are officially hand wash, cool water, air dry. As are most "washable" slippers. And as usual, I'll completely ignore that and put them in with the rest of the wash. I know that this means that they will wear out sooner, and is probably the reason that the non-slip bits on my slippers always get brittle, but I just don't hand wash anything. I do have a front load washer which seems to treat things much better than a top loader.

If these fall apart soon, or stretch too much, I'll come back and edit this review.

08/08/16
- The pile on the fabric is matting down inside and doesn't recover after washing.
- The cut of these is a little different than the Snoozies, and they seem to come off a little more easily.

rating 5.0. Nice Product I broke my hand and bought these, on the recommendation of my physical therapist, to put on under the splint to keep the hand from getting knocked while it healed.  I found that the size was perfect - I could pull it up to just under my knuckles - put the splint on, and still have movement in my fingers.  Or, I could pull it all the way up to cover almost up to my fingertips.  The weight of the fabric is not heavy - I didn't need something hot - it is more like sock material.  They've worked out great!

rating 1.0. Meh. Cashmere feel is a lie. I bought these to keep my hands warm while indoors. They are stretchy and they do offer very minimal warmth at a great price point. I do like the way they are a sleeve vs fingerless gloves because it makes getting them on and off very easy.

However they do NOT feel anything close to cashmere. They don’t even feel like cotton. They feel like polyester. I already find it annoying when sellers stretch the truth for a sale, like it’s 4 pair for $10, there is no need to lie. But.. I went back and looked at the listing. Under Fabrics, it says polyester, cotton, cashmere. If you keep reading under details they leave off the cashmere and only list polyester and cotton. I despise deceitful selling. For that reason I gave one star. If it weren’t for the unnecessary lying, I would have given 3 stars for stretchy, good fit, and design. Since they only offered very minimal warmth and they are meant for warmth- that is why I wouldn’t rate them higher. I suppose they would work better for fashion since you could wear them without getting sweaty.

The mesh inside the hat kept my head cool and the pony holder in the back is adjustable and worked great. The hat is very comfortable and well made and the color is exactly as pictured in the photo (I got the pink and gray). rating 5.0. Just as I hoped it'd be! Update: still love the previous dress-I bought another! I’m now at 130 lbs, so bought a medium. Awesome fit and feel! Just grazes the base of my ankles in tha back. Hope this is helpful!

(Previous buy) I'm 5'0", 145lbs. (bought a Large) This dress seemed well-made and the fabric is thin (but not super thin) but perfect for what you want in a summer dress. The color and print is as pictured. For my height, it grazes the floor at the back so a 1" heel keeps it from dragging. I really loved the fit - floaty and perfect, not voluminous. I wore it to a garden party with gold sheer wrap and nude sandals and got a lot of compliments on it. I would buy again.

rating 5.0. Just as advertised - great bag!!! This bag is well-made and substantial.  As big as I thought it would be and it is heavier, but that's due to the quality of the hardware and leather.  The handles are not flimsy, they're quite sturdy and riveted, same with the crossbody/shoulder strap.  I can wear the short straps as shoulder straps and the bag tucks nicely (comfortably) under my arm (I'm 5'0").  The bag is roomy and has three inside compartments and one inside zippered pocket and two open pockets (for phone or keys) and also one outside zipper pocket. The interior is made with a lovely brown satin-type material - but is thicker than satin and has a quality feel.  The stitching looks meticulously done.  No "pulls" or missed stitches.  I never noticed a "smell", other than the faint, nice smell of leather.  This came professionally wrapped in a logo bag and outside plastic bag and well protected in the box it was shipped in.  I wanted a great looking, beautiful,  high quality bag without a logo splashed across the front - and that's just what I got.  I would definitely buy from Heshe again!

rating 5.0. NATO Band Adapter for Casio Watch Using Spring Bar Strap Mount For the quality of this adapter, it is well made and does the job. I originally did not realize it WILL NOT fit with the non spring bar type watch case using the screws. There is no possible way I can use it with the Mud-Man and some other types in the Pro-Treck series watches that I have.

I tried to order the type of adapter that fits with the other type using the screws. Apparently, they will not ship to Canada. I called Casio. They told me this product is not theirs. They can only supply the original watch band for their watches.

I gave this adapter five (5) stars because it is a very good adapter. I have a few Casio watches that use the spring bar type mount, and therefore this adapter will fit to them very well. If you search out on YouTube there are some excellent videos about this type of adapter and how to use it with a NATO band. If you have a Casio model that complies to the fit of this adapter it will do the job very well.

rating 5.0. They are great, once you get them on. Install was a struggle, and the stock spring bars are too thick. With smaller diameter spring bars and an iron will, you can really help out your G-Shock. You need to lay the watch on the face and install the adapters as they lay flat. A second pair of hands and two spring bar tools might help, but patience and tenacity can get it done.

Once they're on, you will want an RAF strap or a NATO without the keeper, because the keeper loop will tighten against the adapter and lift the watch off your wrist.

rating 1.0. Do not waste your time. Total junk. I am not talking about the fit, I am talking about how much of a PITA it is to change the spring with a g-shock. Seriously, just buy a new watch. Do not waste your time or effort trying to replace the band with these adapters. My old band broke on one side and I had to rip the other side out because the spring would not come loose. You cannot get the tool in properly to replace the spring with these adapters. G-shock has gone through A LOT of trouble to make their bands nearly impossible to change so they can make profit off you buying another watch. The same goes for the exact band for the watch, same problem. Too much hassle and not worth the effort. Just buy a new watch, and not a g-shock. I had mine since 2015, but it has always had some problems so I will never go with g-shock again.

rating 1.0. Not Worth it Just keep your original starp I want to talk about my experience with this product. I will start with everything came in good condition and as described. I have all the tools that are needed to open watches and change straps, so I opened my Casio original strap with no issues at all when I started to work on this adapter it just so hard and wouldn't fit on I tried even the included spring bars with no luck, when I began to add force to make it fit I managed after one hour of trying to make fit and when I finished the final result was a bend spring bar which is ok, I don't mind as long as it will fit, so I added the strap, and when I wore the watch, it was awful it's not flexible at all the adapter are directed in one position which make it unusable and not comfortable at all, after all of this long process my watch was damaged and scratched due the installation process, and it's just not worth it, I removed it and changed it to the original strap which is much better to install and more comfortable.

rating 1.0. Do not buy. Do not buy these. Get the adapters from jaysandkays instead. Those are much better quality. These adapters took me two days to finally get on and that's after I bent two springbar tools. I have several watches and very often switch out bands so I'm very familiar with changing straps and replacing springbars. These things are bulky and not designed well.

rating 1.0. Does NOT fit DW6900 out of the box What a frustrating Piece of junk, an issue of one size fits all, and fits none right.

After several Attempts, and just before the point I got so frustrated I was ready to throw them in the trash. I compared the offending adapters to the factory band, I noticed that they where in need of a trim. from the top you will see three "steps" molded in the resin. the last one that rest against the watch body is much thinner the first two. It was this last "step" that I noticed was hitting the watch body between the lugs. It was this interference that prevent the spring bars from seating properly.

Since these where "junk" I had nothing to lose by performing a little resin surgery. I carefully trimmed this portion off with a sharp Knife. Only needed 5 stitches, so not to bad....

NO Just joking, But be very careful or you may end up needing them. Insert mumbo jumbo legalese here, basically don't be stupid and cut yourself. because Somebody on the internet said you need to cut some resin watch adapter, If your not mature enough to handle a knife and your an adult, well that is not my fault. if your a minor, get a mature adult who knows how to use a knife, unless you are mature beyond your years. again, don't blame me for cutting your finger off.

Ok, back to the watch. after carefully trimming both adapters, the spring bars snapped into place, just as they should, and in a time frame that is more reasonable than trying to fight the unmodified part, and risk ruining your Gshock

rating 5.0. Great build quality for what you pay. Let's face it, if your like me and break/lose sunglasses every month, then investing in Ray-Bans or the like is probably not a viable solution. So, I went on a shopping spree for "cheap" sunglasses on Amazon (<$10), and these were one of the pairs I purchased. I was pleasantly surprised!

PROS:

-Inexpensive!

-Perfect size for medium/large heads.

-Look fantastic.

-Build quality is actually not bad at all for what you pay.

-Well-packed

CONS:

-The anti-glare hue is actually more orange than amber, and so a bit brighter than I expected.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. There are more ways than one to resolve problems---These are beautiful... I bought these to use as accents on the tie-backs for my living room curtains but hesitated to buy them due to lack of positive evaluations on some of this company's items about stones falling out. However since they were exactly what was called for in my situation, I decided to bite the bullet and get them. The company apparently got the message about gems falling out and they included a small tube of very tiny gems to be used in case this occurred.  Even though they are too tiny for the average person to place securely, I say KUDOS to the seller for recognizing what could be a possibility and a means to increase their sales.  On the other hand, I took the brooches downstairs, hung them on a string and pole and gave them front and back a good coating of varnish that is designed to be used on paintings, a hobby of mine. This will add extra security to the gems and also hopefully. prevent any discoloration to the metals used.  Thanks very much...  These are beautiful!

rating 3.0. Disappointing There is no "rope" used on this necklace. It is the same inexpensive plastic string used in cheap leather and jewelry on today's market. The feather has been pressed out of the host material but I found bits of it sticking out on the exterior side of the feather. I was 'very fortunate' when I used my fingernail to pop these off, because the residue bounced off my forehead and not into my eye.... Be careful---don't try this at home. When you do it, wear protective eyewear---and glasses don't count!!!

I expect the jewels to be dropping off real soon. It looks like they are set in there kind of haphazardly and even the sizes are inconsistent.

rating 5.0. Excellent, frugal buy for tall, pregnant, and modest conscious ladies. :) I got this as a maternity shirt and it works great! It's a little sheer, which would normally be a major issue for me. The sheer is mostly when light is coming through from behind, which with a shirt doesn't happen much. It's stretchy and super cool for summer. And it's wonderfully long! I'm 5'11" and 200lbs when I'm not pregnant, and I'm 6 mo pregnant and it fully, comfortably covers my expanding belly. Doesn't get more see through on my belly either.

Some people are concerned with the quality of the finishes and hanging ends at the end, etc. The way I look at it is that I couldn't make something like this for myself at this price, satisfaction, and even quality. It's a frugality mindset that I find important to consider when looking into cheap online clothing purchases.

One little quirk about it I will note is that there isn't a tag at the back of the neck like normal shirts. It seems an identical cut from front to back. Still comfy and modest, but takes me a second to choose how I'm going to put it on when I'm getting dressed. :)

rating 4.0. Works Fine Nothing remarkable.  The white inner cloth does clean a bit better when damp (not wet) and the outer blue one shines things up nicely.  It states not to use it with pearls or 14kt gold or higher as it will scratch.  I don't know if it is just a disclaimer to protect themselves, but I'm not going to take the chance!

rating 4.0. They had gone from shiny to looking almost like brushed nickel and I was an unhappy camper I bought this polishing cloth to clean my silver colored (but brass I believe?) Alex and Ani bracelets that I wore to a music festival and got very dusty and sealed on with what I assume was my aerosol sunscreen. They had gone from shiny to looking almost like brushed nickel and I was an unhappy camper. Sure, it took some elbow grease and yes it made the cloth disgusting (and I wonder where all the black came from since they didn't look like they had soot on them), but they worked very well! Their shine and brilliance is returned and I don't have to replace them. I assume I can use these on many different items of jewelry and I rate it as a GOOD BUY, especially for the price.

rating 5.0. 6 in one! I cut this sewed double cloth into 3 sections and use them for my gold selling and silver jewelry business. I wear lots of sterling silver and this is such an easy and quick way to keep it looking shiny and beautiful without the mess and fuss of polishing paste.  Even really tarnished jewelry polishes up in seconds. Plenty of cloth there to use again and again and again......What a great product!

rating 5.0. Jewelry polisher Primary use to polish silver jewelry. Works great, makes job quick and easy. No messy chemicals to work about, polishing is completed using one side of the cloth and shiring is completed using the other side.  Good investment!
rating 5.0. Great Product This is the very large silver cleaning/polishing cloth. It cleans very, very well. I am so pleased, and I will purchase another.

rating 5.0. Awesome but don't use on pearl, ivory, opal, coral/soft stones Like the other reviewers said- this is a handy product. Folds up small, really gets the tarnish off my sterling silver jewelry.

I wish someone had given me one of these as a wedding or birthday present many years ago!

Didn't realize when I bought it that it doesn't work on all jewelry. The note that came with it says "Cleans, Shines & Protects Gold, Silver and Platinum. Caution: do not use on 24 karat gold, ivory, pearls, opals, coral, lapis, malachite and other soft or porous stones".

Not sure what kind of chemicals are in the cloth itself- I noticed a chemical smell lingered on one of the necklace chains I cleaned with it-- I think more polishing with the outer fabric will do the trick (there is an inner and outer fabric- inside for cleaning and outside for polishing). Suggest washing your hands carefully after handling and don't let kids play with this. (I had previously tried the "natural" cleaners using baking soda and aluminum foil to no avail)

Otherwise very effective and makes my jewelry look great again.

rating 3.0. I don't like  the powder of the Jewelry Care Cloth I use paste silver polish for large silver platters etc. but wanted something more practical for jewelry. I had another silver polishing cloth for many years that was also treated with something to remove tarnish, and I was hoping this would be the same. rating 5.0. Wonderful cloth This is an amazing product to use on any and all silver --- I'm not crazy about polishing silver and caring for my jewlery in general, but I went to Tiffany's recently to fix a bracelet and they gave me one of their polishing cloths and I noticed what a difference just wiping your silver with the cloth did, so when that one got tarnished I decided to give this cloth a try and I am so thrilled!

It's huge! Which is great, it lasts for a while, and its so easy to use and conveniently brings silver to a brilliant shine! I have bought it twice over the past year, and will continue to use it :)
rating 5.0. Perfect! I had a great deal of polishing to do. I thought the cloth would have enough room to complete the task at one go. It did and I am very pleased with this cloth.
rating 5.0. Works Great I used this on tarnished silver necklaces and earrings.  They look like new.  I did not notice any significant smell from the cloth.

rating 4.0. Be Careful This cloth is amazing. I had some silver jewelry that was pretty much black from tarnish, and this cloth cleaned/polished it back to it's original beauty. The way it works is there is a white cloth on the inside to take off tarnish, and then a blue outer cloth for polishing.

The only drawback it that you have to be careful not to use the inner cloth on soft metals, because this cloth will ruin it. It will rub the soft metal off and destroy it.

But you can just use the outer blue cloth for polishing everything. I use a cleaning solution for my gold jewelry and then use the outside or blue side of the cloth to dry/polish it.

I highly recommend this cloth!

rating 1.0. Poor Return to Tiffany So sad!!! I got a Tiffany necklace for graduation, and it got tarnished while I was working in the summer. I got this cloth to polish it off, and now there are little scratches all over my charm! Yes, the tarnish is gone, but my charm is no longer the smooth shiny silver it once was. So disappointed because it was a very special occasion, and the necklace is irreplaceable to me.

rating 4.0. Great polishing cloth I asked my husband to guy this for me since I had a ton of sterling silver jewelry that was tarnished and I never wore anymore.  It is a great cloth, easy to use and took the tarnish off no problem.  I even had a pair of earrings that were BLACK with tarnish.  It does seem that it works differently on different items that are sterling though.  Some of my pieces I cannot buff to as high a shine as others but this cloth helped me discover a whole lot of my jewelry that I thought I was not going to wear again.

rating 4.0. Not disappointed at all The product arrived quickly. It is large enough for me to clean even very large silver pieces. A pair of earrings that were badly tarnished, and unwearable - to my way of thinking, were sitting on my desk for the trial run and they are beautiful now - they look brand new. Tarnish residue was left on my fingers - but that's part of the process, last I checked.
Unfortunately, it seems that some people received and instruction card with the cloth? This was not the case with my order, therefore, I gave it only four stars.

rating 5.0. polishing cloth It does excellent job cleaning the sterling silver.

rating 5.0. Shine ALL the things! I used to have a cloth like this years ago but for a while had trouble finding them. This one worked beautifully on my sterling silver earrings, just as I expected it to. Assuming my photo went through, there's a before and after shot of the earrings so you can see what a difference it makes. For the wires, which are a bit delicate, I lay the wire against my finger and gently stroke it (in one direction) with the cloth. For filigree or other recessed spots, you can wrap the cleaning cloth loosely around the head of a soft-bristled tooth brush and "massage" the tarnish away. I like that there's a (white) cloth treated with the cleaning chemical and a separate (blue) cloth for buffing. I will definitely buy more of these when this one is used up.

rating 5.0. Very Effective Easily removes tarnish and restores shine and luster to jewelry, particularly costume.  I've used it on several pieces of jewelry, and have found it to be very effective.  The dual sided cleaning cloth is particularly appealing, since one side cleans and the other polishes.  Highly recommended.

rating 5.0. Good Product I own a lot of silver jewelry and this product has been the best so far to remove the tarnish. I had this silver beaded bracelet that was almost black, any time I would clean it with other "silver" jewelry cleaner it would become dark in a matter of weeks. Since I've had this product I have only needed to clean it once... and it's been about 3 or 4 months.

It does however, leave your fingers dirty but you can easily wash it off. I also received many uses out of the cloth.

rating 5.0. Great Price for a Great Polishing Cloth I originally got it to clean up a bronze torc that I have and wear regularly, which slowly tarnishes (and darkens) the finish. I wasn't even sure it would work, but from all that I read, I was fairly sure that it at least wouldn't damage it or scratch it up. Well, it not only worked, it worked fast and very well! It only took me about three minutes to have the torc shining like new again; very impressed! I went on to shine up a few pairs of silver earrings and rings that were in need, and again, quick, easy and beautiful!

The best part is that there is no mess like there is with the liquid cleaners, and the cleaning cloth is stitched to the polishing cloth so you always have them together.

rating 2.0. Great idea, but sadly not great implementation While this type of ‘dickey’ is a GREAT idea, it isn’t implemented very well.  It is Very short front and back. Better design would be 2-3” longer allowing the elasticized side straps to not be right under your arm pits (which is very irritating).  I may see IF I can sew on fabric to lengthen front and back which would allow me to move the side straps down from the arm pits.  Fabric and seams are perfectly fine although one side strap came off while trying it on but it think it could be fixed.  Soo all this being said I’m debating on whether to take time and effort to make these actually usable or return them 🥴

After i was bragging on it a bit I found out I had a friend who happened to have bought an almost identical one at a convention in a  trade room, except his was 70 bucks. I felt kinda bad for him. Great deal, cute watch. Looks super cool! The delivery was pretty quick too!

rating 5.0. Old world meets modern flare It's been 8 months and it's still working, it's older style meets modern design is very handsome.  It does seem to loose about a minute a day, but that's not bad at all for the price!

rating 5.0. Pocket Watch I actually bought this to give as a gift.  Sometimes there isn't a clock on the wall when you are speaking before a group, so it's handy to have your own timepiece to glance at as you go along.
rating 5.0. Beautiful! I was unsure of the quality because of the low price but when it arrived I was extremely impressed. Beautiful!

rating 2.0. This product is WONDERFUL if you don't care if it works I saw so many mixed reviews about this watch, but decided to take a chance on it. And for the first 24 hours, I wasn't disappointed. It's beautiful, and kept time really well!

You know, right up until it stopped working the next day. First the hands all stopped moving even though it was properly wound. Then my husband played with it, just resetting the time and such, and the hands started moving again. Well, the second hand did. And occasionally the minute hand. (Like, every couple of hours.) But the hour hand still wouldn't move.

Thankfully, I was able to get a refund without having to return it. I'm going to take it to a shop near us to see if they can fix it, but they may not be able to because the metal inside is too cheap. But seriously, if you want a nice-looking cheap watch for a prop in a play or with a steampunk costume or something, this one is AWESOME. So beautiful! But if you want something functional, don't bother.
rating 4.0. Iffy Watch is excellent so far as presentation but vastly smaller than I thought it would be, but seems more like a Jr's watch; although it is still nice

rating 4.0. its a pretty cool pocket watch About what I expected for $18, the face seems to have a plastic cover, only the back is glass? That's about my only complaint, its a pretty cool pocket watch,  comes with a chain, and has a nice box to keep it in. Its not something I would carry every day, only time will tell if this is durable, but all in all I'm satisfied, it would of got 5 stars if the dial face was glass. It is lighter than expected, and probably would break if dropped? I have a lot of watches I paid under $20 bucks for, and this is well worth it, I'm impressed with the skeleton movement, the way its built and its simplicity!!!

rating 5.0. Very solid. This is one of the many $20 pocket watches floating around here on Amazon. I've ordered a few as I've dropped some over time etc. This is the best I've had sofar. These types of watches have the same internal mechanisms because they're all probably from the same factory so I'll talk about other things. The face being so see-through and non-plastic makes it feel/look far more impressive than $20. The plastic face inside is much flatter, non-moving, and the seams where it connects to the watch are smooth. Much harder to tell it's plastic than some of the other watches. If I break this watch through my own fault I'm buying this exact one again.

The shape and the design are as shown on the seller's picture. I don't have disfiguring wrinkles that many reviewers are talking about. However, I do find a poorly constructed rim problem. I found the thread on the rim was falling apart when I opened the package. The metal wire was exposed. Either the wire was too long (1 1/2 in overlap) and the overlap was too big to hold for the stitches or the sewing job was too poor to hold onto the wire.

The hat came from Korea and it'll be too hassle to return/refund. I'll try to fix it for myself to make it useable. But it is disappointing.

input: rating 5.0. easy to attach These pads save my nose from glasses digging into my skin. They add comfort, help glasses stay put - no sliding. They last forever too - 2 years and just now replaced the pads. They work on all my glasses, easy to attach, and they don't come off unless you remove them. I had a difficult time locating these, luckily they were available here. I am lost without these, a must for this spectacle wearer, painful without their assistance.

rating 5.0. Very effective I have been looking for something to put on my heavy glasses to prevent those ugly indents on my nose. These do look a bit odd when they're on the glasses, but I would MUCH rather the slightly odd look compared to the ugly indents that lasts hours after I have my glasses off. Plus my nose doesn't hurt anymore from the heavy glasses. Very comfortable to wear. Would recommend these to anyone who has pain when they wear their glasses, or don't like the indents.

rating 5.0. Good. For eyeglasses with a projecting stub Very good.
Note that they do not have a projecting stub. They have a recess/hole, into which you insert a projecting stub from the eyeglasses. They are "female" pieces to fit "male" eyeglasses.
Put a bit of silicone glue inside before you install them, and they'll hold well.

rating 5.0. Cheap solution for glasses with uncomfortable noise pieces. I recently purchased a pair of Foster Grant progressive lens reading/computer screen glasses. The glasses have black metal frames and those little plastic nose pieces that wobble. I like the optics of the glasses, but the frames and hard plastic nose pieces were killing the bridge of my nose. These silicone covers, slip on over the plastic nose pieces and stay on without adhesive. The glasses are now quite comfortable. Problem solved.

rating 5.0. Saved my raybans! I own several pairs of rayban. Out of nowhere I developed an allergy to the nosepads. The only replacements are rayban as their pads are an exclusive design and installation. I found these which slip over and now I can wear my raybans again without looking like I got burns on my face. Thank you!

rating 1.0. These should come with a bio hazard symbol! They were the right size because it's listed right in the listing and I measured them before buying. However, they have this really offensive chemical smell. I've never smelled anything quite like it. It gave me nausea in minutes. I had to take them off and put them back in the bag. Even then, a lot of the smell had rubbed off on my sun glasses and even after I wiped them down. Now I can't even wear my sunglasses until I can get rid of the smell.

Another thing is no return policy. Very pricy for what they were. However, I wouldn't of mind because they do fit but it was a bio hazard to keep out in the open.

rating 3.0. SOFT BUT TOO NOTICEABLE... These are what they say they are, which is nose pad covers. My glasses were digging into the side of my nose and leaving red marks. So being soft, they relieved the irritation. But man, they are very large and obvious! I didn't like how they looked, so I found other soft silicone pads that REPLACED my existing nose pads (remove the old pads and slip in the new pads) that were much smaller and I prefer them.

rating 5.0. Fantastic! Works better than expected. I put it over my eyeglass nose pads. Relieves pressure No red mark. Fantastic! I'm surprised. I put it over my own eyeglass nose pads. Because the pads are bigger, the weight of the glasses is dispersed through the pad. Now there is no red mark.

I thought it would start just below my bellybutton, but it starts around the hip and hangs down a couple inches. It would work well to hide any lower body issues you may have, but doesent work too well hiding the tummy area. Also, the shaped foam cups are oddly shaped, not too much of a problem, im thinking of just using some liquid stitch to glue them in place because if they shift....it makes you look like you have wierd shaped boobs. I usually wear a size 14 with a 34DD cup size, so I ordered a Large, this fits me a bit too big. Im not returning it because I can still wear it if i tie the straps tighter and it was cheap enough where its not worth the hassle of exchanging it for a smaller size. rating 4.0. Love this suit! I was a little worried ordering a swimsuit online and not being able to try it on prior. I purchased the red suit with white polka-dots and in most light, it looks more hot pink than red, which is a bit disappointing, but it is still cute. Another concern of mine was my short torso and shot stature (5ft 1). Others had said they had issues with this, but I ordered the size I needed according to the chart, and surprisingly it fits well. Perhaps this is in part due to my belly chubbiness. (I haven't got that pre-baby body back yet, but this suit makes me feel pretty damn good). I love the retro style and this is perhaps the most flattering suit I've ever owned.

rating 5.0. These look rather short for 2.4" [[ASIN:B0076WTCWC Sterling Silver Hand Blown Glass Fresh Green Leaf Dangle Long Earrings 2.4'']]

These are great earrings, they look very nice - but they are pretty small if you're expecting them to dangle 2.4" - maybe the whole length including the hook goes into that measurement. SO if you like long dangle earrings don't buy these. They look very nice with my hair up ( I have very dark hair so they can't be seen with hair down) and are very delicate looking. I'd like them better if they were a bit longer and did not have speckles of glitter in them. They come in a great cloth black velvet look bag and I really like them even if they are not what I expected or wanted so -- I'm off to find another pair of this color green in a pair of earrings. I do like them enough to keep but wish they were a bit longer and more visible when my hair is down. Nice package as Chuvora always has, and their silver is beautiful. I own other earrings and jewelry by them.

rating 4.0. Overall I'm very satisfied with it UPDATE: You can cinch up the shoulder strap to make it snug- so the bag's a little above your waist. You just have to pull the shoulder pad through the clip. However, this only works if you pull it all the way through, then the two clips are butted together, so you basically have one short setting, not adjustable shortness. If that makes sense.
I've been using this as a work bag for about a month. I'm not hard on it but I do carry some heavy gear. So far it's holding up well. Feels solid, no flimsy stitching or thin walls. Overall I'm very satisfied with it, and while it's early in its life, I've had a lot of lower end duffel bags show wear and tear very quickly- with this, so far so good. Two things of note- the shoulder strap, which is sturdy with metal hardware, is pretty long. The shortest I can cinch it up is about as long as I'd ever want it, and I'm 6'2", so something to keep in mind. Also, there are no dividers or side pockets, which I like, less stitching, zippers, panels to get in the way and/or break down. There's one small flap pocket in the inside center of one long side, but it won't hold much- about the size of a sandwich bag. Probably the only reason I didn't give it the fifth star is the shoulder strap- I'd prefer to be able to take 6-12" of slack out of it. Otherwise- I'm very satisfied. Sidenote- if you're on the fence on the size, this is about the size of a large gym bag. I ordered the 30" one (maybe not available on Amazon, and I could have fit inside. It was like a hockey bag.
