rating 2.0. Very disappointed Very disappointed,  Im a 36 34 40, 5'4" 145 lbs. I  usually wear a medium  but on amazon I usually have to by a large or xl, so i went with a large. This dress was so cute in the picture, but does not fit like picture depicts. I did like it but saw to many cons to keep it. First off it was not the type of material i hoped it would be, i wanted material with minimal stretch. Second, it was much longer than the picture depicted, I wanted one that fell above the knee and this one was 2 inches below the knee plus the cut for the hips was at my upper thigh making it look odd.Third, the bottom hemline was crooked, im a bit ocd and that would drive me up a wall. Forth, the size chart is very confusing, with the way they have it listed it seems like all sizes should fit. I was thinking about trying it in a smaller size but i would have to get a small to fit the length I want and im afraid that would be to tight around my waist and not hide my belly fat. The large did fall perfectly in that concern.

rating 5.0. A delightful surprise! Great wallet to protect your credit cards This wallet turned out to be much nicer than I expected. The interior pockets for the cards are nice as they keep them apart. The cash fits on the outside well, but there isn't enough room inside for more than a bill or two. I have a lot of cards, from my driver license, to medical and car insurance cards, AAA, to credit cards. They all fit nicely and it keeps me from carrying around junk or old cards I no longer need.

Plus, the big thing is that it keeps my chip enabled credit cards from being read by a backpack RFID reader. You could also wrap your individual cards in aluminum foil, but that's a hassle to put them in and out and refold each time. This wasn't expensive and worked well. It snaps closed tightly. Well made.
rating 2.0. Does not work for me It's too big than I expected and it does not take all my Cards.  So for me it's useless

rating 2.0. I should have saved this money and invested in another nice leather wallet 8 credit cards only, no more. How many of us have a license, insurance cards, debit card, credit card and a few store cards? Right...everyone. This wallet is huge and can fit 20 cards...but the file folio style holder is not big enough to fit more than a card or two if you get lucky in the middle. Put two cards in each one to get 16 cards today? No dice, it will break the hinge.

Overall, it was disappointing for the price. I should have saved this money and invested in another nice leather wallet. Oh...and no, I do not have a Costanza wallet. I used a small Columbia money clip wallet prior.

rating 4.0. Just as advertised and does block RFID - just beware the hinge It's a solid wallet, just as described. rating 5.0. Buy this one - I don't think you will be sorry. Buy this one!  I have been using an RFID credit card case for some time now. input:
rating 5.0. Awesome fit and great quality Very beautiful leggins, soft yet solid and dense in fabric. Definitely not see-through! I love the feel, as it snugly holds onto the body curves. I also love that it has a crotch insert instead of just a straight seem going along. No camel toe, lol! I got half the colors on here, and they are all equally great!
I recommend these leggins very much!
If you feel that my review was helpful to you, thanks for letting me know!

rating 5.0. Great! These pants are so comfortable! I feel like I'm not wearing pants when I have these on! They are totally squat proof and not see through at all. They don't have a lot of compression or tummy control but they do have some. I would say they are light compression. The tummy control could be better for girls with a little pooch at the lower abdomen like me. Overall, these pants are amazing. For reference, I'm 5'4", 140 lbs and ordered the small/medium.

rating 4.0. Not very supportive, but still very comfortable and opaque leggings! I've been wanting seamless leggings for a while, and after seeing a Youtuber say good things about these leggings, I decided to try them out. I knew they weren't completely seamless (they have seams along the inside thigh/leg area) but liked the look anyways. I am usually a Small and ordered a S/M, which I thought would be perfect. Surprisingly, they were a bit loose. They still look fine, but don't provide much compression or support, so I'd say these are best for lounging around. I wanted to wear them to the gym, and even though they were really thin, they passed the squat test, which is a huge plus. They're also very soft, so you can definitely wear them on any regular day. The high waist band also supports my stomach well. Essentially, even though they aren't very supportive, they are still very comfortable.
rating 2.0. Weirdly big Such a weird fit. The waist band comes up to bra. There's zero compression and they're very loose in the knees and ankles especially. I got the smallest size s/m
rating 1.0. Ripped on first use. Well they ripped the first time I wore them so not happy with the purchase. They were a little small but not to the point where they should have ripped.

rating 2.0. I love the color and feel of these leggings So, I love the color and feel of these leggings, but unfortunately that’s about it. I ordered a size medium as I didn’t want them to be too small/tight when working out and the medium was quite a bit larger than I was anticipating—but initially I thought no big deal—until the inner seam ripped. The fabric was not taut so I’m not sure why they ripped. :(

rating 2.0. Too long, extra fabric in crotch. Returned. I watched YouTube reviews and try-ons of these leggings, and I was sold. They were guaranteed squat-proof (not see-through.) I wanted them by Saturday, so I chose two day shipping at check out so that they’d be delivered on Friday. On Friday after the estimated delivery time, I checked to see where they were and Amazon said they’d arrive the next Wednesday. I opened them after receiving them several days late and tried them on bc I still wanted a nice pair of yoga leggings. They were squat proof, but this was about the only good thing about them for me. I got a size S/M. I’m 5’ and 110 lbs. Because of my height, I’m used to a little extra fabric bunching at the ankles, but these had too much. There was also an excessive amount of fabric in the crotch area. I have no idea why there was so much fabric in the front, but it wasn’t ignorable. It would just bunch up and look weird, especially since my thighs are a little thicker. You’d have to be 5’5” for these to fit right in length & either have very wide hips or a little pouch of fat above your crotch in order to fill them out. I imagine if you have the right height and hip width they’d look nice; however, this whole purchase was an all around disappointment. Returning.

rating 5.0. Comfy, curve hugging leggings Obsessed with these! As soon as they arrived I put them on and was not disappointed. They’re higher waisted, but they don’t cut into your gut like some gym leggings can. The color is awesome and they hug my curves just right! For size reference, I got a small/medium and my measurements are 32-27-38 and I’m 142 lbs and they fit perfect. Get these. Can’t beat the price for awesome gym pants ladies

rating 2.0. The best part is the high waistband - even for me These are cute and fit well overall. The best part is the high waistband - even for me, with a very long torso, it actually reaches my waist! I haven't found any other affordable leggings that do that. However, there are two main issues with these pants. One, there is no compression or shaping, meaning nothing helping you hold in the tummy or lift the booty. And second, the main problem, is that although the pant seems to fit fine when trying it on, with actual wear the pant leg starts to ride up several inches to the point where it looks like a "high-water" pant. It also does it unevenly on each leg, so it doesn't even look purposeful. I wore these a few times but have stopped wearing them because of this annoying issue (I am 5'6" for reference, but as I said, with a long torso, so my legs are not very long). I would not repurchase even though they are so cheap.

rating 2.0. Comfortable but not worth it Pretty flattering. Squat proof. Comfortable. Just received it in the mail today.
However, when I cross my legs, while standing, fabrics bunches in the crotch area. If you stand normal, it's completely fine. I would be embarrassed about crossing my legs in public though.
Mine also came with some of the fabric pilling on one of the legs.
I'll be returning it just because it isn't worth it. Looking at other reviews, I'm also nervous about it ripping if I were to wear it again.

rating 3.0. Theres good and theres bad.. So let me say.. I have a workout legging addition. Which means I have over 60 pair of them ranging from 140$ all the way down to 10$. These are one of my cheapest pairs, but they don't feel as cheap as say, a forever 21 pair of workout pants, which actually cost more than these. They remind me a bit of the gymshark original flex legging material except not as breathable. The fabric is thin but feels rather hot, which I don't love, but not a deal breaker. The inseam is to short for me, but I'm 5'8" with a 34" inseam so I'm used to that. The waist is not as tight as I'd like. I'm a power lifter so last thing I want to worry about is having to keep pulling up my pants when I'm lifting. I got the S/M. Wish there was an XS/S option. I'm 143lbs and a size 4 in Lululemon. There was also a ton of loose threads on the inside of the legs, which I cut but leads me to believe they would easily get a tear or run. Personally I don't think I'll workout in these but I wore them out and about today and they were fine for that.I like how they look on my butt since theres no compression they let your muscles/curves show well, which I prefer no compression. We work hard for that booty girls show it off! For the price these are ok. Better quality than forever 21 or Danskin and cost less than those brands. Would I buy more? No, but will I wear these at least till they rip? Yes, just not to train in.

rating 1.0. These are probably someone of the worst legging I have purchased These are probably someone of the worst legging I have purchased. Overprice by by $20. They have no compression and overly emphasize my muffin top. I wear a size 6 in lulu and purached a medium. They were still too small. I’m 5’3, they were also incredible long so I have several inches of extra fabric at my ankles. Save your $20 and save up for lululemon’s.

current_product_reviews: rating 2.0. Extremely high waisted; waistband too loose 5’3”, 37-28-38 for reference. I bought the “small/medium” grey ombré leggings. The material is very nice, breathable and comfortable. Fits very nicely on my legs, but could use more give in the bum area. The waist band is SO high waisted. It comes up to my sports bra and I feel like I’m wearing a body suit. The waistband is seamless with no elastic band in it which is nice, however it’s too loose around my waist and I’m constantly pulling them up (around my waist, they don’t slide off my bum). I tried rolling them down and it just doesn’t feel comfortable for me. The length is nice if you’re short. It comes about 1/2-3/4” above my ankle. Taller people it may be too short.
other_product_reviews: rating 2.0. Lint lint lint I really like this hoodie originally. The amount of red lint it has since produced is too much for me. After many washes, the hoodie still puts off lint on my shirts, and I mean they’re coated in it!

input: rating 5.0. Nice cut, fit, priced well I finally tried these racer back tanks and love them. They provide good ventilation during heavy workouts, fit almost as expected. I am 5' 9" 175lb and usually wear medium and ordered medium in these and have no complains. I tried Neleus Pro tops as well but like the fit and cut of these better. Color selection is very good. And you can't beat the price.

rating 5.0. Glad I gave these a shot It's always difficult to find the right tank tops with my build so I was skeptical as usual, especially since I couldn't try them on. I'm 5'8 on a good day and weigh 180lbs. WIth all that being said, I'm definitely buying more of these! The material is really soft and comfortable. I bought a pack in medium and they couldn't fit more perfectly. The struggle doesn't have to be real anymore y'all.

rating 5.0. Pleasant surprise. I was a little bit skeptical at first but was pleasantly surprised. The fabric quality was nice, and I really dig the branding that adds a bit of contrast but not cheesy or tacky like a lot of other brands out there.

The fit is great. I am 6ft, 175lbs, chest 43”, waist 34”, and I ordered US size Medium. I like my clothes fit a bit more snug but this one is a perfect in between. Great fit around the chest, doesn’t slide around like a lot of other y-stringers on the market that require you to constantly adjust it. It’s just a couple inches bellow the belt/waist line, so if you like yours longer/looser, take it into consideration.

rating 1.0. Cotton pulls ruined after a few washes I really liked these tank tops because of how breathable they are to wear while I'm weightlifting. The material is also thin, but not sheer or see-through. My issue with this product is that after 4 washes the material now has a cotton pull appearance to them.
How I washed the tank tops were on cold water and delicate settings. I also laid the tank tops to air dry and not in the dryer.

Update***
Just the worst tank tops that could be ordered. The fabric of the tank tops are poor material and not worth the price. You’re better off just buying Hanes tank tops from Walmart.

rating 1.0. A waste of money This costume was cheap so thats the positive thing about it.  The negatives are that it is cheap. The mask is unusable because the way they package it causes it to be wrinkled and not spherical.  The mask is also hot and hard to hear in.

rating 5.0. Jack is back I was pleasantly surprised when the package arrived.  The package stated Extra Large for the size, but some reviews said it would be ok for a large child.  I am 6'2" and just over 200#'s and the costume fit like a glove.  As others commented, the mask is folded in the package and the crease is difficult to work with.  I blew up a 12" balloon in the mask and used a hair dryer on it a few times.  I left the balloon in the mask for a few days and the crease is minor and hardly noticeable.  Now to find a pair of tux pants to go with the jacket...

rating 4.0. Great costume, some parts cheap so here are a few tips This was a pretty great costume - we got a lot of compliments about it. One reviewer had a great tip about stretching the mask over a basketball and using a hair dryer to get the folds out (they are BAD folds too, you will not want to unwrap & wear). We couldn't quite get that to work but we accomplished the same result by stuffing the mask with a small blanket to fill it completely and use the hairdryer. Took about 20 min.

Also, the dickie it comes with is pathetic - really cheap and way too scarce on the fabric - kept sticking up in the back. So, what I found in our house that worked the best was a white Champion workout shirt. It matched the material the closest and looked the best. It isn't a t-shirt, it's the more shiny material - stretchy but keeps its form. Also much warmer!

The costume is only the mask, tie, shirt and vest, so don't forget to make sure you have black pants/shoes/etc. The gloves do not come with it.

I went as Sally, and I actually did not care as much for the licensed Sally. The red yarn wig was more Raggitty Anne than Sally, but the dress and rest of it rocked.

rating 3.0. Jack Costume I chose this costume for my husband to wear on Halloween. The costume only brings the vest, collar and head part. It does not bring the white gloves, black pants or shoes. The quality of the vest and collar were of cheap quality. The head of Jack is very disappointing. The texture is of cheap quality and it comes with too many dents. No matter what you stuff it with to try and remove these dents, nothing works. I was planning to return this item, but with everything that happened with hurricane Sandy. I simply forgot to...

rating 4.0. Good Costume! Used this for a Halloween party. Considering the complaints I other reviewers had about the heat of the mask, I opted to use makeup instead. However, the mask is very well made and would have been very useful if I didn't have the time for the makeup. The costume ended up being a pretty big hit, winning me the costume contest almost unanimously.

I was pleasantly surprised at how NOT wrinkled everything was. The pieces unpackaged nicely and required no extra effort to get presentable.

My only real complaint was that the jacket was too small and the front ended above my waistline (6'0"", 34" waistline). Also, the white shirt included with the costume is actually just a white bib. Hesitant to risk letting my skin peak through, I opted for a white T-shirt instead and it worked out just fine considering how busy the rest of the costume is.
rating 4.0. Nice costume Overall good costume. It fits but just barely. Mask is very hot. You won't suffocate but there isn't much ventilation

rating 5.0. What's this?!? I bought this costume especially for our 2nd Annual Fort Worth Snowball Express 5K. I read the reviews about the mask being hot and hard to breathe in, so I was very wary about it. I ordered the XL and the costume itself fits perfectly! I am 6' 2" tall and the sleeves are a perfect length. The reviews about the white bib are correct. Just wear a white dress shirt instead to keep your belly from showing when the jacket rides up. We found a nice, inexpensive pair of white dress gloves on Amazon Smile to complete the costume. I experimented with a Frogg Togg wrapped around my head inside the mask and was surprised to find out how cool it keeps my head, made it easier to breathe, AND it fills out any dimples in the rubber mask. I was also pleased to see the "Disney" stamp inside the mask! This is a very good quality mask and I'm anxious to hear the feedback from the kids that see me wearing it on Halloween.

rating 5.0. ... a large but after reading the reviews I'm so glad that I sized up( for reference he is 6' ... Bought this for my boyfriend- He is normally a large but after reading the reviews I'm so glad that I sized up( for reference he is 6' 215lbs. The XL fits him perfect with a little bit of wiggle room. I would definitely recommend buying the gloves as they do not come with the costume.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Excellent condition ...price was awesome

rating 4.0. Pretty good. Bummed it was only the jacket, head piece, and bowtie. Does not include gloves or the pants. Four stars because we were disappointed about that. Had to use a small beachball to shape the head. It was horribly smashed. But it works after reshaping for a few days.

rating 3.0. Great look - Product questionable! Love the look!  Others will too.  Consider painting your face as the mask won't remain on for long, too hot & stuffy.  You'd think after 5 years of reviews the mfg. would get the hint about packaging the mask separately in a box to keep its shape.  I'd pay a few extra bucks for the packaging.  The white ascot is also a joke and wasting material making this part of the costume.  Don't they read these reviews?

rating 3.0. Not too shabby I actually had this at a discounted price, but waited an extra day and saw it go up by $8. Still cheaper than what I could get it elsewhere. The ascot is somewhat, well I mean why? A white long tee would have been a lot better. And no gloves, but you include the mask? Even cheap white gloves would have been nice. Of course onto the mask and that I'll have to agree with people. I have another rubberized mask that was a lot more rigid, but with this one, needed to get the shape by stuffing the mask and using low heat on a hair dryer over time to get as close to realistic as possible. The first issue is, why not make the area around the eyes a lot more rigid? That would have a solved a lot of the problem there. And yes it gets hot, but guess what? It's a latex mask and you will get hot unless it's NOT hot outside! Should be fine Halloween evening, but indoors may get me drenched in sweat. All in all a decent costume...

rating 4.0. This is a great looking costume but the mask is hard to wear This is a great looking costume but the mask is hard to wear. It is small on your head and it's hard to breath and gets a bit hot. Definitely will not be able to have the mask on longer than 5 or less minutes at a time.

rating 1.0. why pay for rags Very low quality, not worth the 40+dollars I spent on this costume, the fabric was almost rag quality, the costume looks nothing as good as the picture an the bib used is crap. Will never use this company again.

rating 4.0. Skellington Jack is a Keeper! I bought this costume for my 6'2  190 lb husband. This costume had a great mask although creased. Taking it out and filling it jammed with newspaper helped before wearing. The tie was well made and looked great. The coat fit my broad shouldered hubby well. It was very thin material but I expected this. The only thing we did not use was the bib / white shirt piece. It's easier to wear a white shirt than the flimsy bib. This costume does not come with pants or the gloves. Overall I was pleased. I gave it four stars bc it fit as expected, was fairly well made for the price point. You pay for what you get and I feel that I got that and more for the price.

rating 3.0. You are basically buying the jacket and bow tie. ... You are basically buying the jacket and bow tie. The Ascot does not stay in place and the mask is too thin to hold any kind of shape. I also had to safety pin the closure on the jacket to stop it from opening every time I moved.

rating 1.0. It was bad even after 2 weeks of sitting in the window ... what an awful costume!!  I am 6'2"  180lbs and this costume was incredibly short.  The fabric was thin.  The neck piece was too heavy and cut off the circulation in my neck, making my neck throb.  To wear the outfit you would either have to have very very high pants or have a dark shirt as the jacket isnt even near my belly button.  My wife bought this costume a few weeks before Halloween and aired out the mask in the sun in the window as it smelled so badly of rubber.  It was bad even after 2 weeks of sitting in the window on a paper towel holder,  This costume doesnt come with gloves or pants either.  The costume was so awful when I put it on at Halloween, I took it straight off and I wore last years grim reapers costume instead.  I would only buy this for perhaps a teenage, someone a lot shorter than me, then if you can look past the thin poor quality material and the horrendously smelly mask it might be an alright costume.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Fit perfect. LOVED THE MASK!

rating 5.0. This is Halloween This Jack Skellington adult costume is a cool-looking outfit for the price, that fits well (eye holes are around the nose/ mouth area of the full-head mask). Nice for a Tim Burton fan.  Turns many Halloween heads.

I might even use it as a regular wallet when I'm back from my trip. I like that my iphone can fit in it so I won't have so much to carry.

Has just enough slots for everything and fits nicely in a small purse. Thank you Amazon for the new wallet.

rating 4.0. I love the flashy gold zipper It's close enough to what I'm looking for. Something that I can put my money, cards, and phone in when I want to travel light with the rfid protection.  It's definitely not bulky which is what I wanted.  My Galaxy S5 does fit, but it is snug when you put all your necessities in there. I love the flashy gold zipper. The zipper isn't as smooth as I hoped when using it there is some tension unless I got a lemon.. It's the best RFID clutch so far that I've tried just wish it was a tad bit wider so it wasn't so tight when you zip it up with all your stuff in there but it is doable and wouldn't want anything bigger. rating 5.0. Slim purse that can hold iPhone 6 Plus The purse size is perfect to hold iPhone 6 Plus.  The purse is eye catching.  Many card holder slots for shopping needs. rating 4.0. Great quality wallet! As I was talking to my friend one day about how his credit card info was stolen through his wallet I became paranoid and decided to shop for an RFID blocking wallet. I don't know how often someone's info gets stolen that way but I figured better safe than sorry!

I wasn't really expecting too much out of it but it was cuter than all of the other RFID blocking wallets at a decent price. I ordered it through Amazon prime which ended up taking a week to deliver instead of 2 days. The wallet itself is fantastic quality! It has a chemical smell to it but it's not bothersome. It feels extremely sturdy. I love that it comes with a little strap for your wrist. The zipper is also very nice quality and zips pretty easily. I definitely feel like this wallet looks like it's worth more than what I paid for it.

Now, the downside to this wallet is the fact that there's not that many card slots. I almost didn't buy it because of that. I like having a lot of slots since I have a lot of random reward cards (haha.) Also, the slots seem to be a little snug. The cards do fit but I had to wiggle them in and it's kind of difficult to take out sometimes. If those issues don't bother you much then I would say purchase this wallet! It's definitely worth the money.

rating 5.0. Nice purse. Good size plenty of room. Nice wallet. Good size. Fits my IPhone 6 Plus with my speck case which is a little on the larger side. Good quality, not cheaply made. Plenty of slots for cards, ID and cash. The wristlet it comes with adds a nice touch.

I took this wristlet on trip to Cancun and let me just say I didn't have to pack a bulky purse on top of a carry on bag which made my trip A little more comfy. This little purse slipped right into my carry on making it easy to remove when needed. It held my cash, cards, cell phone, two passports and airline tickets nicely. Easy to get to all our important documents as we went through checkpoints and then easy to tuck away.

Overall very happy with my purchase.

The issue with these is that because they do not have a zipper or button and the waist is not AT ALL stretchy, they are somewhat difficult to pull over your hips. Also, I ordered the size I usually wear in jeans & the legs fit very well but the waist was a little snug. My advice would be to order a size up & just use the drawstring to adjust the waist size. rating 5.0. Have loved these since they first came out! I have owned three pairs of pajama jeans.  The first pair I purchased from a store when they first came out.  They were the original bootcut indigo.  They were very soft inside, stretchy, and warm.  I purchased a second pair of the same style (bootcut indigo) from Amazon and they are almost exactly like the original pajama jeans except they have added pink drawstring inside.  The third pair I purchased was the boyfriend stonewashed style.  The material of the boyfriend style pajama jeans is very different.  It is not soft on the inside.  It feels more like a thin, very stretchy jean.  However, I am not disappointed, they don't get as warm so I can wear these year round.  These jeans look fantastic, are extremely comfortable, and are a bit more stylish than the original style.  I even wore them with heels at work and got several compliments.  The cuff on the boyfriend jean is not sewn in place, so you can roll it down!!  I do recommend treating them like an expensive pair of jeans when you wash them.  Use cold water only and let them either air dry or dry on a very low cycle. I have not had any problems with sizing or shrinkage.  I am a curved size 14 and these are flattering.  If I could ask the pajama jean company to consider one change, I would recommend they make the back pockets bigger.  The back pockets are on the smaller side and as some of you may know, that is not the best look if you have a wide back side.

rating 5.0. I LOVE these jeans I LOVE these jeans.  I intend to order a couple more pair.  They are incredibly comfortable in addition to being stylish.  The size was accurate and they can be rolled up or left rolled down.

Not a big deal, I thought, since I know that some fabrics are treated with pesticide, but, after three washings they still smell strongly of chemical. I hope that this was just a fluke with this one pair, because I would like to go on ordering this product, but not if they are going to hang onto this smell!

Like nothing I had ever smelled on clothing. Even after I washed them they still smelled so strongly it made my stomach hurt and I had to take them off. After a few washes the smell faded (but yuck!). The drawstring openings are NOT reinforced (like buttonhole openings) and have started to rip. For a $50 pair of sweatpants I absolutely expected more. I wouldn't buy another pair nor recommend them to friends sadly.

rating 3.0. Too Small I bought these to use at night to keep my hair from getting damaged. And while I wish I could tell you all how that went, they were too small to fit both my head and my hair (I tie my hair up on top of my head at night; it's thick 3A hair that goes past my chest). I could wrap them around my head without my hair tied up and they'd be a bit loose but there's not enough room for my hair when its up which is the whole reason I got them. For those of you with smaller heads, thinner or less hair, or who just want to tie them around your head I think these will work beautifully for that purpose which is why I gave a neutral 3-star review.

What I can say about them: they are very smooth and silky, however the insides aren't as smooth (I saw another reviewer mention turning them inside out and think that's a smart idea). There's a bit of elastic in the back which gives you some wiggle room and the ties are pretty long (they wrapped around my head twice with a few inches left to tie a bow). They're also really pretty (I got the black and pink combo and they look exactly like the photos). Overall, I would buy these if you think they'll fit your head and hair, or if you just want to wrap them around with your hair down. If they were just a bit bigger I'd recommend them 100% to anyone and everyone.

Pros: silky, pretty colors, not too expensive, elastic plus ties to ensure a good fit.

Cons: too small to tie your hair up if you have a bigger head, and the insides aren't silky/as smooth.

input: rating 5.0. Five Stars Does the job - demagnetizes watches.
rating 3.0. look for better seems to work on very small magnetized parts, but don't think you can do a whole watch even with the back off.. look for better options

rating 4.0. Works, but not if you follow the provided instructions I used th th demagnetize a watch and it did the job. I can't confirm what another reviewer wrote about this being too weak to demagnetize a watch. It worked on the two watches I've tried it on, without opening their caseback.

However, there is is one very important catch with this device: in order to demagnetize, you need an alternating magnetic field, that slowly reduces in strength. This device provides the alternating field, but in contrast to more sophisticated demagnetizers it doesn't gradually shrink. As a consequence, the instructions are incomplete. If you just put your watch on it a hold the button, it won't work. In fact it will leave the watch even more magnetized if you're unlucky! In order to demagnetize, you have to push and hold the button with the watch on the demagnetizer, and then slowly (!) move it away from the demagnetizer while keeping the button pressed. I wish the instructions had been clear on this.

For the price it's not bad, but there are better devices that work automatically.

rating 5.0. Did what it is supposed to My mechanical watch normally gains 6-8 seconds per week. It suddenly began being off by 2 minutes a day. Checked it and it had been magnetized. Placed the watch on this, passed the button and slowly lifted the watch away. Watch is no longer magnetized and is back to gaining 6 seconds a week. If it never functions again, it has paid for its self.

rating 5.0. Awesome for demagnetizing a watch I bought this to demagnetize an automatic watch, and it worked perfectly.  My watch is back to running + / - 2 seconds a day, whereas before it was running insanely fast (+10 minutes a day).

rating 5.0. A useful device for mechanical watches A strange thing happened to my Automatic self winding watch. It was keeping time to within 1-2 seconds per day. It has excellent calibration. Then while traveling one day it suddenly starting running fast. I noticed my watch was a minute fast and was gaining 10 seconds per hour. I looked online and learned that a magnetized watch can be one of the causes for a change in calibration. Using the compass on my iPhone I passed my watch by it and it deflected the compass 90 degrees. Seeing that, I ordered this watch demagnetizer. By the time it came my watch had dissipated most of the magnetism. It also had gone back to near normal calibration. I used the demagnetizer on my watch and it completely removed all of the residual magnetism. My watch no longer deflects the compass. The calibration is back to normal. After 7 days it has gained just 14 seconds.
Now I started wondering how my watch got magnetized in the first place. It was my travel bag. My travel bag has full length pockets on each side that use powerful magnets to stay closed. Apparently, I must have put my watch hand into those pockets and exposed my watch to the powerful magnetic field. It was a one time occurrence but now I have this demagnetizer in case something like this ever happens again.
rating 1.0. Cheap. Don't buy it hurt my watch. Actually made the watch run faster!
rating 5.0. Buzz, buzz! Works well, nice price, good to have on hand if you like auto watches.
rating 2.0. Demagnetizer issues Came with no instructions at all . Tried demagnetizing some tools  , it vibrated and buzzed , Tools are still magnetized  ...

rating 5.0. Great solution to remove magnetism. Product is as described and works perfectly. As a horologist/watchmaker, this is an invaluable tool to have. This device will remove magnetism quickly and easily from watches and even tools. It only takes 3 seconds of exposure to this device and presto, its demagnetized.

The one thing that one has to be mindful about is that you don't want this around a heart pacemaker. Also, keep this away form any type of computer mechanical hard drive. This unit with no doubt erase the hard drive with no chance of retrieving your data.

The unit didn't come with instructions but it's not hard to use. Simply place the watch atop of the unit and press the button for about 2 - 3 seconds. That's it. Practice with a screwdriver that is magnetized. When the screwdriver no longer picks up metal, congrats, you are ready for the watch.

If you want to re-magnetize the screwdriver, simply place the screwdriver atop of a standard magnet and remove by quickly pulling the screwdriver away from magnet.

Great price, couldn't make it for this price.
rating 1.0. useless - totally ineffective useless...I tried demagnetizing a Seiko SKX009 and this thing did nothing...worked at it for half an hour...

rating 5.0. This Fixed my Breitling Watch Which Was Running Fast This little gadget fixed my vintage Breitling Cockpit watch I purchased 2 weeks ago that was running over 2 minutes fast per day.
I read up on this running fast issue and apparently some watch parts get magnetized over time.
Demagnetized back and front 10 seconds 2X. Pulling watch slowly away from unit.
Now watch sitting on shelf for 1/2 day is 4 seconds slow. This should get better when I wear it for a week.
rating 1.0. One Star Product looks heavily used and does not contained a polarized plug.  I returned it.

rating 1.0. Doesn't work on larger, high-end watches Not powerful enough to work on large high-end automatic watches. I own a TAG Heuer Carrera 44mm Calibre 16 Day-Date Automatic Chronograph. Despite being a member of TSA Pre-Check, the mental midget working the security line at the airport made me take off my watch and put it through the x-ray machine. Now, thanks to that $7/hr genius tasked with keeping us safe at the airport, my $5000 watch is gaining 10 minutes an hr.

Despite numerous attempts, this device did nothing to demagnetize my watch. I know how to use the device, so it is not user error. This is a very cheap Chinese made device. It doesn't even include instructions, though there are plenty of instructions to be found online.

I would not recommend this product. It might do the trick with screwdrivers and may even work with some of the smaller, thin cased wrist watches. However, if you've got a real high-end timepiece this thing is worthless. What you need is one of the high powered demagnetizers. I've since returned this one and ordered one of the $70 machines offered on Prime . You get what you pay for folks!
rating 1.0. One Star Came with no instructions not sure how to use. Afraid I could ruin my expensive watch.

rating 1.0. Very poor build quality Very poor build quality.

The demagnetizer arrived in new condition, but it was functionally inoperable. Closer inspection showed that the already-sketchy-looking push-button power switch had completely failed, which prevented the device from turning on. I opened it up to see if I could fix it, and I almost wished I hadn't. The shoddy internal construction was horrifying and potentially unsafe. I certainly wouldn't recommend leaving it plugged in any longer than absolutely necessary.

rating 4.0. Not good at all -> Update: Pretty good! Would have been great if it worked (and if AMZL delivered it on time without the erroneous 2 extra-day delay)
Mine came brand new in box, however the device had obvious signs of use. For ten bucks, I absolutely wasn't expecting the world. However, upon arrival the top of the case was dented in, the face of the product scratched and the LED non-working. It's obvious that this thing has seen some wear and tear before being shoved into a box and buttoned up all neat-like. Not the best show, even for 10 bucks. I at least expected it to come new and unused. Overall terrible experience from order start to receipt. Look for another company to buy one of these from if needed, I say.

**UPDATE** I wanted to update this review and bump it a few stars as the customer service was top notch. They emailed me and addressed the issues I had with the original and I wasn't expecting that. They sent me out a new version which is far, far better than the original that came (that's been since trashed) and this one works a treat. It still has a few light scratches all over it, but overall for ten smackers it's perfectly ok compared to the disheveled nature of the first one. Device LED works, the device seems to work perfectly fine and brought a +1m13s/day (yeah, no joke..) ETA2824-2 down to just -5/day and with some slight regulation efforts I was able to bring it into a seriously accurate -2s/day. Wow, what a difference, I thought I was going to have to take her in for service for SURE! I'm happy with the device overall and super happy with the results! Sure there are better options online, however you'll pay more and if my experience says anything, you may not really even need to dish out the extra cash for a fancier option. I can now recommend it if your timepiece is magnetized.

rating 1.0. Not worth money, literally doesn't work. Literally doesn't work. I ordered the product and it promptly arrived at my doorstep. Open the package and there are already scuffs on the product, which shows its been used before. Then I tried to plug in the demagnetizer into the wall and the LED light does not turn on. I tried pressing the button but nothing happened either. The button is made of flimsy material and I could feel the button spring buckle when I pressed it down. I tried multiple times to demagnetize my watch thinking that the LED light was just defective, but it hasn't fixed my watch at all. Absolutely a joke product, forget about it even working on my magnetized watch, it doesn't even turn on!

rating 5.0. Works on Watches I purchased this to demagnetize two mechanical wristwatches. It worked well. If I recall, one watch need two 'treatments' but no biggie. I'd assumed magnetized watches ran really fast, but one was only a little fast and this fixed it. To test your watch - hold the watch next to an old fashioned needle compass, if the watch 'pulls' the needle either to or away, it's likely magnetized.

I purchased another dress from Amazon that looks a lot like this one from another company and it is terrible, I cannot keep the straps on my shoulders no matter how I try but the straps are perfect on this one. rating 5.0. I brought 4 dresses on a cruise but I just wore this one every day instead. This dress is soooo comfy and soooo cute. It is a thinner fabric but not sheer, it's just perfect for hot summer weather when you just can't bear the thought of putting on pants. The straps are adjustable which was great for me, I could shorten them all the way and make a nice midi-length beach dress, or let the straps out all the way and make an almost-floorlength dress for walking around the deck on my cruise. When I let the straps all the way out it was very low cut though so I did wear a sports bra underneath for more coverage. I could have easily dressed this up with a shawl or scarf and nice shoes, but it looked great with sandals or beachy flip-flips as well. Overall it is the purchase I am happiest about in preparation for my cruise and I might just purchase 4 more just like it for my next cruise. I just wish it came in a 100 colors so I never had to wear anything else!

rating 3.0. I thought it wasn't so bad I figured my ear would get used to it These earrings showed up on time there was no damage. but I want to start off by saying these are not your typical earrings. Looks are deceiving by all means. The earrings are square maybe rectangle shape  not your  typical round tip that you would Have on ear rings. At first when I noticed the unusual shape I didn't think anything of it into  began to insert the earring in my ear.  Now your typical earing is a lot smaller and round tip Then this is square rectangle shape that begin to quickly stretch out my ear hole.  I thought it wasn't so bad I figured my ear would get used to it.  Then the earring wouldn't clamp in the back it's not the typical ear ring where it  clamps easily on. Of course!  Nooo, this is the kind of ear ring that where you have to separated the ear ring and insert it in the little hole and it became extremely painful since my ear hole was not used to being open so wide.  I do wear the earrings for a couple hours and my ears hurt for two whole days afterwards.  My personal opinion only because I think my  your holes are not used to being spread  that why if you have wide your holes these hearings are perfect for you. rating 5.0. First let me say that this necklace is beautiful and the picture doesn't even do it justice First let me say that this necklace is beautiful and the picture doesn't even do it justice. It sparkles like Austrial fire opals on steroids. Really breathtaking. Now comes the negative: Both the very low price and the fact that the metal type is only listed as "alloy" made me think. Well, follow this link[...] and find out for yourself that most Chinese jewelry is made of cadmium which is very toxic and cancer-causing. If the link doesn't work just google "Chinese jewelry, safety". As much as I dislike doing this it is going into the trash. Can't risk my health for this.

rating 4.0. Beautiful set I love this necklace set!  The colors are brighter than depicted, change as the light hits them, and appear to be plastic pieces that are semi-opaque.  The metal is very very cheap and would undoubtedly turn my neck green if I wore it too long, but appears somewhat sturdy, and I don't anticipate that the chain or links will break easily or that the plastic bits will pop out of their settings.  The earrings are light enough that I don't notice them.  And what great trickery!!  My husband wanted to know if they were labradorite!  ( I actually have a similar blue-green labradorite necklace and it is about 2x heavier) I wore this set out for our anniversary, with a low cut black dress and they were gorgeous!!  Will be wearing them often, for dress up nights out.  They also arrived a whole week before anticipated, which was much appreciated.

My granddaughter is redesigning the necklace and there are enough gems to make another necklace, so for her amusement I'm keeping it.  And the ad copy is terribly misleading!  No purple, no shells, no bubbles, and certainly not a fragment of luxury anywhere.  Embarrassing.

rating 2.0. Not the dress that was advertised...... UPDATED***

ZANZEA Women's One Off Shoulder Striped Irregular Long Maxi Dress Loose Kaftan.

I Purchase this dress Because I it looked really nice on the person wearing it in the photo. When I received this dress a few days ago, I was really disappointed.

I wear size a 16 and XL-2XL is shirts. I thought this dress would fit great but I was totally wrong. This dress was way bigger then it was doscribed. I honestly thought that this dress would look just like the photo. But, the Neckline looked more like an oval shape and the dress does not come off the shoulders just like it was shown in the photo. In the photo the slits looked like it was more in the front but on the dress I received its on the sides. This "Irregular" shaped dress is not Irregular and has no shape at all to it. Being a plus size girl I look for clothing that will make me look nice. This dress does the opposite of making me look nice. I really thought this would be a sexy dress, even my husband did not like this dress on me.

PROS:
Lightweight feeling.
Soft and comfy material.

CONS:
Too thin of a fabric.
Not a sexy dress at all.
Way bigger than I thought.
Not an Irregular shape dress.
The slit is on both sides not in the front.
The Neckline does not come off the should.

***Please let me know why you do not believe my review is not helpful? Please do not click not helpful if you are just doing it to do it***

Over ALL, I do not recommend this ZANZEA Women's One Off Shoulder Striped Irregular Long Maxi Dress Loose Kaftan because It does not resemble the dress the model is modeling in the photo and does not look sexy at all. The dress looks more like a night gown for an older women, not something a younger women would wear.

rating 3.0. Torn Between 3 Stars and 2 I ordered 2 of these, one in XL and one in 2X. I am 5'4" and 163 lbs. I usually wear a large in tops. My first impression was disappointment, as the dresses I received (except for the stripes) look nothing like the one the model is wearing in the photograph here on Amazon. They are cut strangely and rather than slits on the sides, they have these huge, almost silly-looking U-shape cutouts. They have ordinary boat necklines, and if your shoulders aren't too broad, you'll be able to pull it down off a shoulder, but unless you're truly tiny, it will not hang way off the shoulder like it does on the model. The XL fit me well and looked slenderizing on me. The 2X did have a little extra fabric, and was baggier and less slenderizing on me than the XL. I gave it to a relative who is about 40 lbs heavier than me, and she fit it, although it doesn't really hang off her shoulder. I noticed that both the XL and the 2X have exactly the same size neck opening. I also noticed some sloppy stitching and broken threads. Only because of the very reasonable price, did I decide to keep it and wear it around the house. I may even get a couple more, (at this low price), because they do make nice house dresses and the fabric feels soft and comfortable.

I have a 38" waist and am going to add an elastic piece to make it fit me because I love the look of the belt. Wish they made it larger. It is too tight to wear for me. I am really sucking it in here ;)-

rating 4.0. Nice little watch display dome My grandfather had a well-used pocket watch that we wanted to display. We found this perfect glass dome with a walnut-color base that we now use for this purpose. The brass finial on top looks great. Only complaint is that the hook inside is pretty thick and clumsy - looking more like a cup hook that something to display fine watches. However, the watch looks great, it is protected from dust and we're happy to have it out where people can see it.

Perfect to sit on a table for display.  Glass dome arrived in good shape as did the rest.  Would highly recommend to anyone wanting to display a pocket watch.  Very pleased.

rating 5.0. Dust resistant. If you have antique watches this ids the product for you it allows the watch to be displayed and is dust proof which can really play havoc with and antique watch. The product was not broken when it arrives because it is packed securely.

rating 4.0. Does not hold my watch properly.... This is a very nice looking domed watch holder. Base is nicely finished and fits in nicely with most furniture. The glass dome is exactly that and topped with a nice finial, and I experienced no problems with hanging the watch I own on the hook. I would have given it a 5 star rating, except for the fact that my watch did not fit the case as it should have. I have a old Rockford Watch railroad watch which is large in size, the watch touches the bottom of the base once the dome is placed on the base. This raises the watch ever so slightly off the hook allowing the watch to "spin" slightly from side to side. I wish that I knew that the dome was not tall enough to hold the watch properly as it should be suspended slightly above the base. At any rate not a bad item considering the price. Word of caution, make sure that your watch will fit this dome before ordering it to avoid the issue I am dealing with.

I would not let this discourage you from buying OTHER cheap jewelry, but this is definitely not something I would recommend. The seller did issue a full refund for me though, which made the whole transaction just a little bit better.

The face is easy to read, unlike other watches I've owned that had to be angled just so to see the time. I have a small wrist and needed six links removed. While the tool for removing links is included, I didn't want to attempt the work myself. I brought it to a jewelry repair shop, where I paid $12 for any link adjustments needed over a thirty day period. I really love the elegant look of this watch, and am so far completely happy with it. If my opinion changes over time I will re-post.

input:
rating 4.0. Great Buy! I love this watch!. I love the pastel pink color it comes in. The silicone, like one of the other reviewers mentioned, has a hint of metal to it. So while the strap feels soft like silicone, it looks clean and sheen. It doesn't look rubbery at all. The display is reasonably large so the digits are legible. I wish it were a little brighter though, because I sometimes have to tilt the watch towards the light to read the time clearly. It does have a light function but I don't like having to use my other hand. I however expected this from the images here, so it's not a disappointment at all. It's great if what you're looking for in a watch is time, date, stopwatch and alarm functions. Overall a wonderful product for the price. I've just received this and I'm very happy so far. I look forward to seeing how the watch holds up.

Three months later:
The color on the silicone fades off ever so slowly, but the watch is still in good condition. I've ended up really appreciating the light feature. I can't read my other digital watch in the dark.

input: rating 2.0. I really wanted to like these leggings I really wanted to like these leggings. I wanted to love them. No, really. They are so soft, and felt super amazing. Obviously, as soon as I got home from class I ditched my pants for the black pair of these leggings. And I thought that I might never take them off because they just are that awesome. The high waist feels like heaven. The fit is as if they were made for me; not tight and not loose. Seriously, the Goldilocks of leggings! The ankles hit at my ankles. How does that even happen?! The outside is deliciously smooth, while the inside is like kittens hugging my legs. So, comfy leggings on, I sat down at the computer to read some news and rock out some homework. I did exactly (and only) that for 2 and a half hours. Then, I walked to the bathroom and when I pushed the leggings down... there was a hole in them. After only 2.5 hours of sitting almost entirely still. I'm terrified to even look at the other two pair that I ordered, much less try them on. With a heavy heart, I must return these and continue my search for clothes that can contain my booty for longer than 2 hours while keeping up with the overwhelming demands of my rather sedentary lifestyle. Two stars because the product would have been magical, if not for the remarkably short lifespan. First two photos are me being excited about new leggings! Third photo is me being severely, utterly disappointed.

rating 5.0. Awesome!!! Fits well/good coverage/no sagging I have just now come around to wearing leggings and I can't help but wonder why it took me so long.

First, I paid full price for these and would buy them again. They are so soft on the inside with a light sheen on the outside. They come up high enough to not worry about any sort of muffin top and have a nice wide band. Also, they don't slide down during the day!

I wouldn't mind if they were a little thicker for winter, but thicker leggings tend to not come up high enough in the back to cover my butt and I'm pulling them up constantly. This wasn't an issue with these. I did not notice any see through problems when wearing them. I did stretch them a bit with my hands and I could see where they could start being see through, but probably only if you are wearing a size that's several sizes too small. I am 5'4" and about 165 lbs. I bought the M/L.

I would definitely buy more colors in the future.

rating 1.0. Cheap material = runs in the crotch/butt area in a matter of hours! I really really wanted to like these.  They fit fantastically, and are so comfortable. Mine came with a stain on the grey pair.. okay, it happens.  Returned, and reordered.  Just received them yesterday, put through the wash (as instructed) have been wearing the brown pair for two hours, and there's a huge run in the butt!!!  Comfortable, but cheap quality.  Such a huge waste!

rating 1.0. Not even worth the cheap price that they are..... At this price I might have expected them to last a month or two, but they are really junk - I only got about a week out of one pair & another was unusable out of the package.

The brown pair had 2 runs in them before I even put them on - they were hidden so I wore them & surprisingly they didn't pill as bad as the black, but the runs got big enough after 4 uses to make them unusable. The grey pair was threadbare on the top and completely unwearable out of the package.
Returning them after 2 weeks of getting the most out of them I possibly could.

rating 5.0. Absolutely no reason to pay huge prices for a good band ! This was a great purchase.  Don't pay those very high prices at "vendor" just for a band.  They have only two styles!  Aluminum and stainless steel case, that's it, nothing else.  All interior workings are the same. Extra pricing is just for bands.  I purchased this very sharp band, took it to a watch repair, as it was difficult of me to take out links. It comes with two sturdy tools to take out the link, see box photo, but still it was easier to take it to a watch repair person.  He took out three links in a minute, and it fit perfect.  He didn't want to charge, so I tipped him. As far as changing bands?  Apple has made in incredibly simple.  Your finger easily pushes the almost hidden button under the band and the band slides off easily sideways, as does this band slide back on easily.  I've already received compliments, within hours of wearing the new band.

It's not perfect, but it does look good and is very comfortable.  I would highly recommend this for all Apple Watch owners.  If something ever happens to this band, I will just buy another one of the same kind.  Excellent value for this band.  I love the box with tools it came with also!

input:
rating 3.0. Casio Black-Resin-10304195 I have a Casio Pathfinder watch so I searched for a replacement band specifically for this watch. The band listed above was the recommended replacement. I liked the fact that it was black resin because I have another Casio with this type of band and it is very comfortable and sturdy. Now the reason for a three star rating : This band is NOT made for this watch. As another reviewer wrote it had to be modified to fit. Removing the old band and attaching the new band is a chore (not the fault of Amazon). You will need two jeweler type screwdrivers,using both at the same time, one to hold one screw which is stationary (it is permanently attached to the bar) and one to hold the other screw. You will really have to work at it because it is tight You will also have to figure out which screw is attached to the bar. By keeping the removable screw stationary with one screwdriver you turn the other screw to back out the bar from the band I used a vice to hold the watch securely.Going to a jeweler is another option but considering that the band has to be modified at each end, the jeweler may not want to do it. I used a sharp knife to shave each end to make it fit. The band is also a little narrower than the old one so after I finally reattached the new band , the screws which were flush with the old band, protrude just a tad bit.
Casio bands are not "generic" so I don't believe an aftermarket band would work. I am sure that Casio makes a replacement band for this watch but this is not the one. After all the work to remove,modify and replace, the end result looks good. New hardware is not supplied with the band so be patient and be careful because these parts are tiny so if you drop one it could disappear into never never land. Good Luck !!!
Update 07/30/13...Although I am still not happy that I had to modify the band to fit my Casio Pathfinder, I find myself liking the band more and more. The mods I have made are not visible to anyone but myself and it will most likely last a long ,long time.

rating 4.0. Aha a waterproof band I bought this one because does not have the leather adornments on it.  The leather does not go good with water.  This band replaced the nylon style band that originally came with my watch.  It was a little hard to get it on but that was not the fault of the new band. I only rated it 4 stars because the resin bands usually get brittle and crack in a couple of years of wearing them 24 hours a day.

rating 5.0. Great OEM band I couldn't tell the difference between this one and my original band. I have a CASIO SGW-100. This is OEM band.very good quality in every detail. Very pleased.
Easy to install. You need to note that the metal part does not come with replacement band, so keep the 2 metal components found under your original band (where the joint is). it is a crucial part to make sure your pin stays properly.

rating 5.0. I just got this replacement band and it took about ... I just got this replacement band and it took about 10 minutes to install. rating 3.0. Good band - needs additional parts I ordered this band to replace a nylon fabric and leather band that came with the watch. These end links and pins were not listed as included with this band, and were not available from this source. I went to "pacparts.com" to order them. This info should help the rest of the reviewers that could not install their bands.

rating 4.0. Factory replacement band for the SGW-100 This is the original replacement for the watch band of the Casio SGW-100 1V watch.

It fits as you'd expect and it's made of black resin.

I can't really say much about it because it's a very simple item. I scoured the internet looking for an alternative band but couldn't find any that'd fit and that I could also buy.

My main complaint is the fact that is plastic, so in a few years it will end up hardening and eventually breaking apart like the original watch band in my watch. It's also black plastic, which makes matters worse in the short term. Considering the problem that plastic poses to the environment, Casio should move away from this material for their watch bands and move towards durable and recyclable materials friendly to the environment, I hear hemp is biodegradable and can be molded into almost anything.

One caveat, this band does NOT contain the metal bands nor the pins to attach this band to your watch. So remember to keep those when replacing it because otherwise you won't be able to secure it to the watch.

If you have a Casio SGW-100 1V watch and you need to replace the band, this is the one you want and need.

input: rating 5.0. Pretty little huggies I must admit it was the price that initially got me, and didn't really care much for the design. I only needed a huggie I can wear to work. When this arrived, my son took the blue and black ones, while I kept the gold and silver ones for myself. They looked really great. The perfect size for someone who has midlobe piercings. And it clicks! You can actually hear when it locks; so I know it won't be falling off my ears. They're not as shiny as other jewelry but that's how I like it, kind of a matte shine, if such exists. I've worn the gold ones a couple of days, and have gotten a few compliments at work. We will see how they hold up to daily wear and then I will update my review.
rating 4.0. For the cost an excellent deal! You really can sleep in these. For the cost an excellent deal!
rating 2.0. Two Stars Couldn't fit into ear. Multiple people tried. Decent quality.

rating 5.0. These huggie earring were a perfect gift for her My niece hates having earring that had the backing sticking into her ear as she lays down.  These huggie earring were a perfect gift for her!  They stay clipped in and don't poke the back of your ear!!!

rating 5.0. These earring fit great! I have extreme metal allergies These earring fit great!  I have extreme metal allergies, and am having no problem at all with these.  I even sleep in them.  Very nice finish as well.

rating 5.0. Great for sports! Great value, great variety, comfortable, easy to put on!  This set of four is a great value!  Don't let the great price make you think quality is compromised.  They are easy to attach, hug my ears so that they are safe for sports, babies that grab earrings, and riding a motorcycle with my helmet.  They all have a beautiful sheen to them and look like they will last for a long time.

rating 2.0. Too small, and too sharp. I loved the finish, and I loved the colors.  However, the part of the earring that sits closest to your ear - front and back - was sharp and could have easily cut my ear if I got bumped in the ear.  The second part that was discouraging is that the curved wire that goes through your ear was too short and I could not get them onto my ear and latch it shut.  I have nice healthy ear lobes, but I would never consider them fat.  These will stay in my jewelry drawer as a reminder to watch what I buy in earrings.
rating 5.0. Good quality! Good quality and my client loves them!

rating 5.0. Love these! **Update Year Later** Love these!! Myself and my daughter are unable to have most types of earring, either our ears turn green, they start to swell, or the normal earring actually work Through the holes and fall out. not pleasant.
None of those issues with these!!! They hold extremely well, I use them for my every day, including sleeping, and bathing. You will NOT regret this!

Over a Year Later and these are still great!! I wear them all the time nothing has changed. AND my ears never reacted to it!!! Which is a huge thing because i have so much issues.

rating 4.0. Manufacturer needs to smooth ends!! So far, I have only tried the blue pair.  The first time I wore them, my ears became inflamed, and I could not tell if it was from the sharp edge on the ear post or the metal itself.  I let my ears heal, filed off the sharp edge and tried them again.  This time, they were ok.  The manufacturer needs to smooth the end of the ear post to prevent injury.

rating 1.0. Stylish but Unwearable Attractive appearance and style BUT can't wear them. The wires are far too short to go through an earlobe let alone close. Buyer beware and see other similar reviews. Not worth the time and expense to return so off to Goodwill with these.

rating 2.0. Difficult to get on. Hurt my ears after wearing them. I thought these were cute as I don't like large earrings. They were difficult to put on since the post is curved. My daughter couldn't get them on at all. My ears hurt after wearing them, so I'm not sure if they are truly stainless steel as I am sensitive to materials. Returned them.

rating 5.0. Perfect! clasp is great! size is perfect sheen is beautiful Love these!!! After searching many hoops for the second piercing I finally found a good pair 4 good pair!
Perfect! clasp is great! size is perfect sheen is beautiful. They stay closed overnight. I have washed my hair and slept in them no issue with falling out. Thank you. Love them.
rating 2.0. On the small side Earrings are very small. Perhaps fine for young ears. Wires had a coating on them and was unable to get them in my ears. Loved the colors just not big enough.

rating 5.0. I most definitely recommend this product to any one who needs a couple ... Where do I begin? They look absolutely gorgeous. Especially for the price paid. They came in neat packaging, and the earrings are all high quality. None of that "green skin" problem that so many products at this price would cause. This is definitely a steal at this price. I most definitely recommend this product to any one who needs a couple of pairs of earrings for various occasions. I wear the gold ones when I dress casual. The blue ones for work. And then when I dress formally, depending on my outfit I alternate between the black and silver.

rating 5.0. love these earrings I have sensitive ears that get infected easily with fake jewelry or plated jewelery so I was hesitant to try these. But my ears have not had any reaction. rating 3.0. Not Hypoallergenic... So I have one ear that is sensitive to metals. As in itching, drainage, etc. In the past have switched earrings from one side to the other to make sure it wasn't just the earring. There are a rare few types of earrings I can wear without having to 'doctor' them up with nail polish or any other tricks. Unfortunately this is not one of them. Within half an hour my ear was itching up a storm.

I do like the look of them and at the time of buying, they were on sale for $10, so I'll just end up fixing them up so my sensitive ear can tolerate it.

But yeah, those with sensitive ear piercings... Think twice before buying this.
rating 3.0. Posts are short The posts are very short.  Okay if you have skinny earlobes.

rating 1.0. BEWARE THESE ARE NOT SURGICAL STEEL Read all the reviews and BEWARE OF METAL ALLERGIES - these are NOT surgical steel!  I had a rash on both earlobes within eight hours of putting these in!  I have worn surgical steel before with no reaction so I know these are not that grade.  i am now on benadryl and am waiting for the swelling and rash to dissipate.  If you do not have metal allergies, they are great little hinged earrings.  Mine, however, are in the trash can.

rating 2.0. Posts are too short to get into my ear! I have seen other people saying that the metal bothered their ears. The posts are so short - unless your earlobes are very thin. Wasted my money on these.
